26916.title: Expectations, reference points, and compliance with COVID-19 social distancing measures
26916.zh_title: 预期、参照点与COVID-19社交距离措施的遵从度
26916.authors: Guglielmo Briscese, Nicola Lacetera, Mario Macis, Mirco Tonin
26916.abstract: We surveyed representative samples of Italian residents at three critical points in the COVID-19 pandemic, to test whether and how intentions to comply with social-isolation restrictions respond to the duration of their possible extension. Individuals reported being more likely to reduce, and less likely to increase, their self-isolation effort if negatively surprised by a given hypothetical extension (i.e., if the extension is longer than what they expected), whereas positive surprises had no impact. These results are consistent with reference-dependent preferences, with individual expectations serving as a reference point, and loss aversion. Our findings indicate that public authorities should carefully manage expectations about policy measures and account for behavioral reactions to deviations from previous announcements.
26916.zh_abstract: 我们在COVID-19大流行的三个关键时间点对意大利居民的代表性样本进行了调查，以检验遵守社交隔离限制的意愿如何对其可能延长的持续时间做出反应。个体报告称，如果给定的假设延长（即延长时间超出其预期）令其感到负面意外，则他们更可能减少、而非增加自我隔离的努力，而正面意外则没有影响。这些结果与参照依赖偏好（以个体预期作为参照点）和损失厌恶相一致。我们的发现表明，公共当局应谨慎管理对政策措施的预期，并考虑对先前公告偏差的行为反应。
26916.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：C42, D91, H12, H41, I12

26915.title: A Fisherian Approach to Financial Crises: Lessons from the Sudden Stops Literature
26915.zh_title: 金融危机的费雪方法：来自突然停止文献的教训
26915.abstract: Sudden Stops are financial crises defined by a large, sudden current-account reversal. They occur in both advanced and emerging economies and result in deep recessions, collapsing asset prices, and real exchange-rate depreciations. They are preceded by economic expansions, current-account deficits, credit booms, and appreciated asset prices and real exchange rates. Fisherian models (i.e. models with credit constraints linked to market prices) explain these stylized facts as an outcome of Irving Fisher's debt-deflation mechanism. On the normative side, these models feature a pecuniary externality that provides a foundation for macroprudential policy (MPP). We review the stylized facts of Sudden Stops, the evidence on MPP use and effectiveness, and the findings of the literature on Fisherian models. Quantitatively, Fisherian amplification is strong and optimal MPP reduces sharply the size and frequency of crises, but it is also complex and potentially time-inconsistent, and simple MPP rules are less effective. We also provide a new MPP analysis incorporating investment. Using a constant debt-tax policy, we construct a crisis probability-output frontier showing that there is a tradeoff between financial stability and long-run output (i.e., reducing the probability of crises reduces long-run output).
26915.zh_abstract: 突然停止是指由大规模、突然的经常账户逆转所定义的金融危机。它们既发生在发达经济体也发生在新兴经济体，并导致深度衰退、资产价格崩溃和实际汇率贬值。它们之前伴随着经济扩张、经常账户赤字、信贷繁荣以及资产价格和实际汇率升值。费雪模型（即与市场价格相关的信贷约束模型）将这些典型事实解释为欧文·费雪债务通缩机制的结果。在规范方面，这些模型具有一种货币外部性，为宏观审慎政策提供了基础。我们回顾了突然停止的典型事实、宏观审慎政策使用和有效性的证据，以及费雪模型文献的发现。定量来看，费雪放大效应很强，最优宏观审慎政策大幅降低了危机的规模和频率，但它也很复杂且可能具有时间不一致性，而简单的宏观审慎政策规则效果较差。我们还提供了一个包含投资的新宏观审慎政策分析。使用恒定债务税政策，我们构建了一个危机概率-产出前沿，表明金融稳定与长期产出之间存在权衡（即降低危机概率会减少长期产出）。
26915.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E3, E37, E44, F41, G01, G18

26914.title: The Gender Gap in Housing Returns
26914.abstract: Housing wealth represents the dominant form of savings for American households. Using detailed data on housing transactions across the United States since 1991, we find that single men earn 1.5 percentage points higher unlevered returns per year on housing relative to single women. The gender gap grows significantly larger after accounting for mortgage borrowing: men earn 7.9 percentage points higher levered returns per year relative to women. Approximately 45% of the gap in housing returns can be explained by gender differences in the location and timing of transactions. The remaining gap arises primarily from gender differences in execution prices: data on repeat sales reveal that women buy the same property for approximately 2% more and sell for 2% less. Women experience worse execution prices because of differences in the choice of initial list price and negotiated discount relative to the list price. Gender differences in upgrade and maintenance rates, and preferences for housing characteristics and listing agents appear to be less important factors. Overall, the gender gap in housing returns is economically large and can explain 30% of the gender gap in wealth accumulation at retirement.
26914.zh_abstract: 住房财富是美国家庭储蓄的主要形式。利用1991年以来美国各地住房交易的详细数据，我们发现单身男性每年在住房上的无杠杆回报率比单身女性高出1.5个百分点。在考虑抵押贷款借款后，性别差距显著扩大：男性每年获得的杠杆回报率比女性高出7.9个百分点。大约45%的住房回报差距可以由交易地点和时间的性别差异解释。剩余的差距主要源于执行价格的性别差异：重复销售数据显示，女性购买同一房产的价格大约高出2%，而卖出价格低2%。女性之所以获得更差的执行价格，是因为在初始挂牌价格的选择以及相对于挂牌价格的议价折扣方面存在差异。升级和维护率、对住房特征和挂牌代理商的偏好等方面的性别差异似乎是不太重要的因素。总体而言，住房回报的性别差距在经济上很大，可以解释退休时财富积累性别差距的30%。
26914.meta: Programs：AP, CF, LS；JEL：D14, D31, G4, G51, J16, R2

26913.title: On the Representativeness of Voter Turnout
26913.zh_title: 论选民投票率的代表性
26913.abstract: In prominent voting models, expected pivotality drives voters’ turnout decisions and hence determines voting outcomes. In practice, many individuals turn out for reasons unrelated to pivotality, and their votes overwhelm the forces analyzed in pivotality-based models. Accordingly, we examine a model of large-N elections at the opposite end of the spectrum, where pivotality effects vanish and turnout is driven entirely by individuals’ direct costs and benefits from the act of voting itself. Under certain conditions, the level of turnout is irrelevant to representativeness—and thus to outcomes. Under others, “anything is possible:” for any distribution of underlying preferences, any other distribution of preferences in the turnout set—and thus any voting outcome—can arise. We characterize particular skews in terms of representativeness and offer limiting results. These results sharpen and in some respects redirect applied work examining voter turnout, with an emphasis on underlying determinants of representativeness.
26913.zh_abstract: 在著名的投票模型中，预期的关键性驱动选民的投票决策，从而决定投票结果。在实践中，许多人出于与关键性无关的原因投票，他们的选票压倒了基于关键性模型所分析的力量。因此，我们考察了一个大N选举模型，该模型处于光谱的另一端，其中关键性效应消失，投票完全由个体投票行为本身的直接成本和收益驱动。在某些条件下，投票率水平与代表性无关，从而也与结果无关。在其他条件下，“一切皆有可能”：对于任何潜在偏好分布，投票集中任何其他偏好分布（从而任何投票结果）都可能出现。我们根据代表性描述了特定的偏差，并提供了极限结果。这些结果使考察投票率的应用研究更加精确，并在某些方面重新调整了方向，重点强调了代表性的潜在决定因素。

26912.title: The Economics of Nicotine Consumption
26912.abstract: The development of nicotine replacement therapies and e-cigarettes emphasize and highlight that, in tobacco demand, nicotine is one of, if not, the primary object people want. This chapter presents a simple model of utility maximization that focuses specifically on nicotine as the object of interest. It yields a derived demand for a nicotine delivery technology and predictions researchers can use to account for patterns in consumption over the life-cycle of individuals and the market as a whole. The model is informed by available evidence about the neurological effects of nicotine and differences in the relative efficiency and associated physical costs of nicotine delivery devices, and genetic differences across individuals that partly explains variation in nicotine consumption. The analysis highlights that one of the key theoretical objects of interest is the price per unit of nicotine delivered to the brain. The limited empirical literature on e-cigarettes does not measure that price. All told, economists have much to offer in modeling and empirically studying demand for the new nicotine delivery products. In addition, a range of studies could look back, reconfigure prices and measured consumption, to better explain patterns in historical time-series data on consumption and substitution across different nicotine delivery devices.
26912.zh_abstract: 尼古丁替代疗法和电子烟的发展强调并凸显了，在烟草需求中，尼古丁是人们想要的主要对象（如果不是唯一对象）。本章提出了一个简单的效用最大化模型，专门将尼古丁作为关注对象。它产生了对尼古丁输送技术的派生需求，以及研究者可用于解释个体生命周期和整个市场消费模式的预测。该模型基于关于尼古丁神经效应的现有证据、尼古丁输送设备相对效率和相关物理成本的差异，以及部分解释尼古丁消费变异的个体间遗传差异。分析强调，关键的理论对象之一是每单位输送到大脑的尼古丁价格。关于电子烟的有限实证文献并未衡量该价格。总而言之，经济学家在建模和实证研究新型尼古丁输送产品的需求方面大有可为。此外，一系列研究可以回顾过去，重新配置价格和测量消费，以更好地解释历史时间序列数据中不同尼古丁输送设备消费和替代的模式。

26911.title: Taming the Bias Zoo
26911.authors: Hongqi Liu, Cameron Peng, Wei A. Xiong, Wei Xiong
26911.abstract: The success of the behavioral economics literature has led to a new challenge—a large number of behavioral biases offering observationally similar predictions for a targeted anomaly in financial markets. To tame the bias zoo, we propose a new approach of combining subjective survey responses with observational data; this approach has the advantage of being robust to question-specific biases introduced through surveys. We illustrate this approach by administering a nationwide survey of Chinese retail investors to elicit their trading motives. In cross-sectional regressions of respondents’ actual turnover on survey-based measures of trading motives, perceived information advantage and gambling preference dominate other motives, even though they are not the most prevalent biases simply based on survey responses.
26911.zh_abstract: 行为经济学文献的成功带来了一个新的挑战——大量行为偏差为金融市场中的特定异常提供了观察上相似的预测。为了驯服偏差动物园，我们提出了一种将主观调查回应与观测数据相结合的新方法；这种方法具有对通过调查引入的特定问题偏差稳健的优点。我们通过实施一项针对中国散户投资者的全国性调查来引出其交易动机，以此说明这种方法。在受访者实际换手率对基于调查的交易动机指标的横截面回归中，感知信息优势和赌博偏好主导了其他动机，尽管它们并非仅基于调查回应的最普遍偏差。

26910.title: Do College Applicants Respond to Changes in Sticker Prices Even When They Don't Matter?
26910.zh_title: 大学申请者会对即使无关紧要的标价变化做出反应吗？
26910.authors: Phillip B. Levine, Jennifer Ma, Lauren C. Russell
26910.abstract: Do students respond to sticker prices or actual prices when applying to college? These costs differ for students eligible for financial aid. Students who do not understand this may not apply to some colleges because of the perceived high cost. We test for this form of “sticker shock” using College Board data on SAT scores sends, as a proxy for applications, to state flagship institutions for students entering college in 2006–2013. Some public flagships guarantee financial aid will meet full financial need. Sticker price increases at those schools would not affect the actual cost after factoring in financial aid and should not affect decisions for those eligible for aid. We exploit the large and variable increases in sticker prices at public flagships during the financial crisis generated from state budget shortfalls. We also control for local labor market conditions to abstract from the recession’s impact on individual educational decisions. We find evidence of sticker shock — students unaffected by virtue of institutional aid policies still apply less often. Using data from the National Student Clearinghouse, we also find that price increases at public flagships reduce enrollment of high achieving students, regardless of financial aid status, who often choose private colleges instead.
26910.zh_abstract: 学生在申请大学时是对标价还是实际价格做出反应？对于有资格获得经济援助的学生来说，这些成本是不同的。不理解这一点的学生可能因为感知到的高成本而不申请某些大学。我们利用大学理事会关于SAT成绩发送的数据（作为申请的代理变量）来检验这种“标价冲击”形式，研究对象是2006-2013年入学的州立旗舰大学学生。一些公立旗舰大学保证经济援助将满足全部经济需求。这些学校的标价上涨不会影响考虑经济援助后的实际成本，因此不应影响有资格获得援助的学生的决策。我们利用了金融危机期间因州预算短缺导致的公立旗舰大学标价的大幅且多变上涨。我们还控制了当地劳动力市场状况，以抽象掉经济衰退对个人教育决策的影响。我们发现标价冲击的证据——因机构援助政策而不受影响的学生仍然较少申请。利用国家学生信息中心的数据，我们还发现公立旗舰大学的价格上涨减少了高成就学生的入学率，无论其经济援助状况如何，这些学生通常转而选择私立大学。

26909.title: The Incubator of Human Capital: The NBER and the Rise of the Human Capital Paradigm
26909.zh_title: 人力资本的孵化器：NBER与人力资本范式的兴起
26909.abstract: The human capital construct is deep in the bones of economics and finds reference by many classical economists, even if they did not use the phrase. The term “human capital,” seldom mentioned in economics before the 1950s, increased in usage starting in the 1960s. By the early 2000s, about 20% of all books concerned with economics mentioned the phrase human capital. In the early 1980s, about 15% of NBER working papers referenced human capital whereas just 6% of all economics articles did. Today the figure for the NBER exceeds 25% and is 20% among all economics articles. The concept of human capital is part of almost every field of economics. The NBER played an outsized role in the rise of the concept of human capital mainly because of its emphasis on empiricism. We explore how the NBER was an incubator of human capital research and the ways human capital theory transformed and broadened its research agenda.
26909.zh_abstract: 人力资本概念深深植根于经济学中，许多古典经济学家都曾提及，即使他们没有使用这个短语。“人力资本”一词在20世纪50年代之前的经济学中很少被提及，从20世纪60年代开始使用频率增加。到21世纪初，大约20%的经济学相关书籍提到了人力资本这一短语。在20世纪80年代初，大约15%的NBER工作论文引用了人力资本，而所有经济学文章中只有6%这样做。如今，NBER的这一数字超过25%，在所有经济学文章中为20%。人力资本概念几乎存在于经济学的每个领域。NBER在人力资本概念的兴起中发挥了超常作用，主要是因为其对经验主义的强调。我们探讨了NBER如何成为人力资本研究的孵化器，以及人力资本理论如何转变并拓宽了其研究议程。

26908.title: Banking Crises without Panics
26908.authors: Matthew Baron, Emil Verner, Wei Xiong
26908.abstract: We examine historical banking crises through the lens of bank equity declines, which cover a broad sample of episodes of banking distress both with and without banking panics. To do this, we construct a new dataset on bank equity returns and narrative information on banking panics for 46 countries over the period 1870-2016. We find that even in the absence of panics, large bank equity declines are associated with substantial credit contractions and output gaps. While panics can be an important amplification mechanism, our results indicate that panics are not necessary for banking crises to have severe economic consequences. Furthermore, panics tend to be preceded by large bank equity declines, suggesting that panics are the result, rather than the cause, of earlier bank losses. We also use bank equity returns to uncover a number of forgotten historical banking crises and to create a banking crisis chronology that distinguishes between bank equity losses and panics.
26908.zh_abstract: 我们通过银行股本下降的视角审视历史上的银行业危机，这涵盖了一个广泛的银行业困境样本，既包括伴有银行业恐慌的案例，也包括没有恐慌的案例。为此，我们构建了一个新的数据集，包含1870年至2016年间46个国家的银行股本回报率以及关于银行业恐慌的叙述性信息。我们发现，即使在没有恐慌的情况下，银行股本的大幅下降也与显著的信贷收缩和产出缺口相关。虽然恐慌可能是一种重要的放大机制，但我们的结果表明，恐慌并非银行业危机产生严重后果的必要条件。此外，恐慌往往发生在银行股本大幅下降之后，这表明恐慌是早期银行损失的结果，而非原因。我们还利用银行股本回报率揭示了许多被遗忘的历史银行业危机，并创建了一个区分银行股本损失与恐慌的银行业危机年表。
26908.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：G01, G21

26907.title: Learning about the Neighborhood
26907.authors: Zhenyu Gao, Michael Sockin, Wei Xiong
26907.abstract: We develop a model to analyze information aggregation and learning in housing markets. In the presence of pervasive informational frictions, housing prices serve as important signals to households and capital producers about the economic strength of a neighborhood. Our model provides a novel mechanism for amplification through learning in which noise from the housing market can propagate to the local economy, distorting not only migration into the neighborhood, but also the supply of capital and labor. We provide consistent evidence of our model implications for housing price volatility and new construction using data from the recent U.S. housing cycle.
26907.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个模型来分析住房市场中的信息聚合与学习。在普遍存在信息摩擦的情况下，住房价格成为家庭和资本生产者了解社区经济实力的重要信号。我们的模型通过学习提供了一种新的放大机制，其中来自住房市场的噪音可以传播到当地经济，不仅扭曲了向社区的迁移，还扭曲了资本和劳动力的供给。我们利用近期美国住房周期的数据，为模型关于房价波动和新建筑的含义提供了一致的证据。
26907.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E22, E44, G1, R3, R31

26906.title: Human Mobility Restrictions and the Spread of the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV) in China
26906.zh_title: 人员流动限制与新型冠状病毒（2019-nCoV）在中国的传播
26906.authors: Hanming Fang, Long Wang, Yang Yang
26906.abstract: We quantify the causal impact of human mobility restrictions, particularly the lockdown of the city of Wuhan on January 23, 2020, on the containment and delay of the spread of the Novel Coronavirus (2019-nCoV). We employ a set of difference-in-differences (DID) estimations to disentangle the lockdown effect on human mobility reductions from other confounding effects including panic effect, virus effect, and the Spring Festival effect. We find that the lockdown of Wuhan reduced inflow into Wuhan by 76.64%, outflows from Wuhan by 56.35%, and within-Wuhan movements by 54.15%. We also estimate the dynamic effects of up to 22 lagged population inflows from Wuhan and other Hubei cities, the epicenter of the 2019-nCoV outbreak, on the destination cities' new infection cases. We find, using simulations with these estimates, that the lockdown of the city of Wuhan on January 23, 2020 contributed significantly to reducing the total infection cases outside of Wuhan, even with the social distancing measures later imposed by other cities. We find that the COVID-19 cases would be 64.81% higher in the 347 Chinese cities outside Hubei province, and 52.64% higher in the 16 non-Wuhan cities inside Hubei, in the counterfactual world in which the city of Wuhan were not locked down from January 23, 2020. We also find that there were substantial undocumented infection cases in the early days of the 2019-nCoV outbreak in Wuhan and other cities of Hubei province, but over time, the gap between the officially reported cases and our estimated “actual” cases narrows significantly. We also find evidence that enhanced social distancing policies in the 63 Chinese cities outside Hubei province are effective in reducing the impact of population inflows from the epicenter cities in Hubei province on the spread of 2019-nCoV virus in the destination cities elsewhere.
26906.zh_abstract: 我们量化了人员流动限制，特别是2020年1月23日武汉市封城，对遏制和延缓新型冠状病毒（2019-nCoV）传播的因果影响。我们采用一组双重差分（DID）估计，将封城对人员流动减少的影响与其他混杂效应（包括恐慌效应、病毒效应和春节效应）区分开来。我们发现，武汉封城使流入武汉的人口减少76.64%，流出武汉的人口减少56.35%，武汉市内流动减少54.15%。我们还估计了来自武汉和湖北省其他城市（2019-nCoV疫情中心）的滞后人口流入对目的地城市新增感染病例的动态影响，滞后期长达22期。我们发现，利用这些估计进行模拟，即使其他城市后来实施了社交距离措施，2020年1月23日武汉市封城也显著减少了武汉市以外的总感染病例。我们发现，在反事实情景下，即武汉市未从2020年1月23日起封城，湖北省外347个中国城市的COVID-19病例将增加64.81%，湖北省内非武汉的16个城市的病例将增加52.64%。我们还发现，在2019-nCoV疫情早期，武汉和湖北省其他城市存在大量未记录的感染病例，但随着时间的推移，官方报告病例与我们估计的“实际”病例之间的差距显著缩小。我们还发现证据表明，湖北省外63个中国城市加强的社交距离政策有效减少了来自湖北省疫情中心城市的人口流入对目的地城市2019-nCoV病毒传播的影响。

26905.title: The Political-Economy Trilemma
26905.abstract: This paper investigates Rodrik’s political-economy trilemma: policy makers face a trade-off of choosing two out of three policy goals or governance styles, namely, (hyper-) globalization, national sovereignty, and democracy. We develop a set of indexes that measure the extent of attainment of the three factors for 139 countries in the period of 1975-2016. Using these indexes, we examine the validity of the hypothesis of the political-economy trilemma by testing whether the three trilemma variables are linearly related. We find that, for industrialized countries, there is a linear relationship between globalization and national sovereignty (i.e., a dilemma), and that for developing countries, all three indexes are linearly correlated (i.e., a trilemma). We also investigate whether and how three political-economic factors affect the degree of political and financial stability. The results indicate that more democratic industrialized countries tend to experience more political instability while developing countries tend to be able to stabilize their politics if they are more democratic. The lower level of national sovereignty an industrialized country attains, the more stable its political situation tends to be, while a higher level of sovereignty helps a developing country to stabilize its politics. Globalization brings about political stability for both groups of countries. Furthermore, more globalized countries, whether industrial or developing, tend to experience more financial stability. Future data will allow us to test the possibility of regime changes associated with the post-2016 dynamics.
26905.zh_abstract: 本文研究了罗德里克的政治经济三难困境：政策制定者面临在三个政策目标或治理风格中选择两个的权衡，即（超）全球化、国家主权和民主。我们开发了一套指数，用于衡量1975年至2016年间139个国家在这三个因素上的实现程度。利用这些指数，我们通过检验三个三难变量是否线性相关，来考察政治经济三难困境假设的有效性。我们发现，对于工业化国家，全球化与国家主权之间存在线性关系（即两难困境），而对于发展中国家，所有三个指数都线性相关（即三难困境）。我们还研究了这三个政治经济因素是否以及如何影响政治和金融稳定程度。结果表明，更民主的工业化国家往往经历更多的政治不稳定，而发展中国家如果更民主，则往往能够稳定其政治。工业化国家实现的国家主权水平越低，其政治局势往往越稳定，而更高的主权水平有助于发展中国家稳定其政治。全球化给两组国家都带来了政治稳定。此外，无论是工业化国家还是发展中国家，更全球化的国家往往经历更多的金融稳定。未来的数据将使我们能够检验与2016年后动态相关的政权更迭可能性。

26904.title: The Dynamic Efficiency in Resource Allocation: Evidence from Vehicle License Lotteries in Beijing
26904.zh_title: 资源配置的动态效率：来自北京车牌摇号的证据
26904.authors: Youming Liu, Shanjun Li, Caixia Shen
26904.abstract: The efficiency of resource allocation is often analyzed in static frameworks with a focus on the cross-sectional heterogeneity in the willingness to pay among users. When the resource is durable in nature, the temporal heterogeneity could be important in assessing the efficiency properties of different allocation mechanisms. This paper uses a dynamic model to empirically quantify the efficiency outcome of using lotteries to allocate scarce resources among forward-looking consumers. In the context of the lottery policy for vehicle licenses in Beijing, our analysis shows that lotteries significantly affect intertemporal decisions in that households participate in lotteries at least four years earlier on average than they would be in a counterfactual environment of no quantity constraint. The welfare loss due to temporal heterogeneity and resulting changes in participation decisions accounts for over half of the total welfare loss from the lottery policy. The analysis highlights the importance of taking dynamic efficiency into account in designing resource allocation mechanisms.
26904.zh_abstract: 资源配置的效率通常在使用者支付意愿的横截面异质性框架下进行静态分析。当资源具有耐用性时，时间异质性对于评估不同分配机制的效率特性可能很重要。本文使用动态模型，实证量化了在具有前瞻性的消费者中通过摇号分配稀缺资源的效率结果。在北京车牌摇号政策的背景下，我们的分析表明，摇号显著影响了跨期决策，即家庭参与摇号的平均时间比在无数量限制的反事实环境下至少提前了四年。由时间异质性及由此导致的参与决策变化造成的福利损失，占摇号政策总福利损失的一半以上。该分析强调了在设计资源配置机制时考虑动态效率的重要性。

26903.title: Which Banks are (Over) Levered? Insights from Shadow Banks and Uninsured Leverage
26903.zh_title: 哪些银行（过度）杠杆化？来自影子银行和无保险杠杆的见解
26903.authors: Erica Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
26903.abstract: We examine why banks maintain such high financial leverage, with debt financing accounting for about 90% of banks’ assets. To answer this question, we use uniquely assembled data on capital structure decisions of shadow banks that on the asset side conduct very similar business to banks. The shadow bank data provides us with a window into “free market” financing choices of financial intermediaries that unlike banks are lightly regulated and do not have access to insured deposit funding. We demonstrate that shadow banks employ twice the amount of equity capital compared to equivalent banks, with the most significant disparity observed between smaller and mid-size banks. Uninsured leverage, defined as uninsured debt funding to assets, increases with size for both banks and shadow banks while cost of debt declines with size. We rationalize these facts within a calibrated quantitative equilibrium model of intermediation. Our analysis reveals that the primary driver of high leverage among smaller and mid-size banks is their access to insured deposit funding. In the absence of deposit insurance, these banks would maintain a capitalization level at least 25% higher in relative terms than observed in the data. Conversely, deposit insurance plays a comparatively minor role in influencing the financial leverage of the largest banks, where the predominant factor is their capacity to generate money-like deposits. These results suggest a significant scope for the increase of capitalization of smaller and mid-size banks to align their capital structures with their private market counterparts. The aggregate consequences of such increase would be limited, because of reallocation of lending activity from smaller to large banks and to shadow banks.
26903.zh_abstract: 我们研究了为什么银行保持如此高的财务杠杆，债务融资约占银行资产的90%。为了回答这个问题，我们使用了影子银行资本结构决策的独特汇编数据，这些影子银行在资产方面与银行开展非常相似的业务。影子银行数据为我们提供了一个了解金融中介机构“自由市场”融资选择的窗口，这些中介机构与银行不同，受到轻度监管且无法获得受保险的存款融资。我们证明，与同等银行相比，影子银行使用的股权资本是其两倍，最显著的差异出现在中小型银行之间。无保险杠杆（定义为无保险债务融资与资产之比）随着银行和影子银行规模的扩大而增加，而债务成本随着规模的扩大而下降。我们在一个校准的定量均衡中介模型内对这些事实进行了合理化解释。我们的分析表明，中小型银行高杠杆的主要驱动因素是它们能够获得受保险的存款融资。在没有存款保险的情况下，这些银行的资本化水平将比数据中观察到的相对高出至少25%。相反，存款保险对最大银行财务杠杆的影响相对较小，其主要影响因素是它们创造类似货币存款的能力。这些结果表明，中小型银行有显著的空间提高资本化水平，使其资本结构与私人市场同行保持一致。这种提高的总体后果将是有限的，因为贷款活动会从中小型银行重新分配给大型银行和影子银行。

26902.title: Data Gaps and the Policy Response to the Novel Coronavirus
26902.zh_title: 数据缺口与对新型冠状病毒的政策应对
26902.abstract: This note lays out the basic Susceptible-Infected-Recovered (SIR) epidemiological model of contagion, with a target audience of economists who want a framework for understanding the effects of social distancing and containment policies on the evolution of contagion and interactions with the economy. A key parameter, the asymptomatic rate (the fraction of the infected that are not tested under current guidelines), is not well estimated in the literature because tests for the coronavirus have been targeted at the sick and vulnerable, however it could be estimated by random sampling of the population. In this simple model, different policies that yield the same transmission rate β have the same health outcomes but can have very different economic costs. Thus, one way to frame the economics of shutdown policy is as finding the most efficient policies to achieve a given β, then determining the path of β that trades off the economic cost against the cost of excess lives lost by overwhelming the health care system.
26902.zh_abstract: 本文阐述了基本的易感-感染-康复（SIR）流行病学传染模型，目标受众是希望理解社交距离和遏制政策对传染演变及与经济互动影响的经济学家。一个关键参数，即无症状率（在当前指南下未接受检测的感染者比例），在文献中并未得到很好的估计，因为针对冠状病毒的检测主要针对病人和脆弱人群，但可以通过对人群进行随机抽样来估计。在这个简单模型中，产生相同传播率β的不同政策具有相同的健康结果，但可能具有非常不同的经济成本。因此，构建停工政策经济学的一种方式是，找到实现给定β的最有效政策，然后确定β的路径，以权衡经济成本与因医疗系统不堪重负而导致的超额生命损失成本。

26901.title: An SEIR Infectious Disease Model with Testing and Conditional Quarantine
26901.zh_title: 具有检测和条件隔离的SEIR传染病模型
26901.authors: David W. Berger, Kyle F. Herkenhoff, Simon Mongey
26901.abstract: We extend the baseline Susceptible-Exposed-Infectious-Recovered (SEIR) infectious disease epidemiology model to understand the role of testing and case-dependent quarantine. Our model nests the SEIR model. During a period of asymptomatic infection, testing can reveal infection that otherwise would only be revealed later when symptoms develop. Along with those displaying symptoms, such individuals are deemed known positive cases. Quarantine policy is case-dependent in that it can depend on whether a case is unknown, known positive, known negative, or recovered. Testing therefore makes possible the identification and quarantine of infected individuals and release of non-infected individuals. We fix a quarantine technology—a parameter determining the differential rate of transmission in quarantine—and compare simple testing and quarantine policies. We start with a baseline quarantine-only policy that replicates the rate at which individuals are entering quarantine in the US in March, 2020. We show that the total deaths that occur under this policy can occur under looser quarantine measures and a substantial increase in random testing of asymptomatic individuals. Testing at a higher rate in conjunction with targeted quarantine policies can (i) dampen the economic impact of the coronavirus and (ii) reduce peak symptomatic infections—relevant for hospital capacity constraints. Our model can be plugged into richer quantitative extensions of the SEIR model of the kind currently being used to forecast the effects of public health and economic policies.
26901.zh_abstract: 我们扩展了基础的易感-暴露-感染-康复（SEIR）传染病流行病学模型，以理解检测和基于病例的隔离的作用。我们的模型嵌套了SEIR模型。在无症状感染期间，检测可以揭示感染，否则这些感染只有在后来出现症状时才会被发现。与那些表现出症状的人一起，这些个体被视为已知阳性病例。隔离政策是基于病例的，因为它可以取决于病例是未知、已知阳性、已知阴性还是已康复。因此，检测使得识别和隔离感染者以及释放非感染者成为可能。我们固定一种隔离技术——一个决定隔离中传播差异率的参数——并比较简单的检测和隔离政策。我们从一项基线仅隔离政策开始，该政策复制了2020年3月美国个体进入隔离的比率。我们表明，在该政策下发生的总死亡人数，可以在更宽松的隔离措施和对无症状个体进行大幅增加的随机检测下发生。结合有针对性的隔离政策，以更高频率进行检测可以（i）减轻冠状病毒的经济影响，以及（ii）减少症状性感染峰值——这与医院容量限制相关。我们的模型可以嵌入到当前用于预测公共卫生和经济政策效果的SEIR模型更丰富的定量扩展中。

26900.title: The Effect of Privacy Regulation on the Data Industry: Empirical Evidence from GDPR
26900.zh_title: 隐私监管对数据行业的影响：来自GDPR的经验证据
26900.authors: Guy Aridor, Yeon-Koo Che, Tobias Salz
26900.abstract: Utilizing a novel dataset from an online travel intermediary, we study the effects of EU’s General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). The opt-in requirement of GDPR resulted in 12.5% drop in the intermediary-observed consumers, but the remaining consumers are trackable for a longer period of time. Our findings imply that privacy conscious consumers exert privacy externalities on opt-in consumers, making them more predictable. Consistent with this finding, the average value of the remaining consumers to advertisers has increased, offsetting some of the losses from consumer opt-outs.
26900.zh_abstract: 利用一家在线旅游中介的新数据集，我们研究了欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）的影响。GDPR的选择加入要求导致该中介可观测的消费者数量下降了12.5%，但剩余消费者的可追踪时间更长。我们的发现表明，注重隐私的消费者对选择加入的消费者施加了隐私外部性，使其更可预测。与这一发现一致，剩余消费者对广告商的平均价值有所增加，部分抵消了消费者选择退出带来的损失。

26950.title: Aggregate and Firm-Level Stock Returns During Pandemics, in Real Time
26950.zh_title: 大流行期间的总量和公司层面股票回报：实时视角
26950.authors: Laura Alfaro, Anusha Chari, Andrew N. Greenland, Peter K. Schott
26950.abstract: We show that unexpected changes in the trajectory of COVID-19 infections predict US stock returns, in real time. Parameter estimates indicate that an unanticipated doubling (halving) of projected infections forecasts next-day decreases (increases) in aggregate US market value of 4 to 11 percent, indicating that equity markets may begin to rebound even as infections continue to rise, if the trajectory of the disease becomes less severe than initially anticipated. Using the same variation in unanticipated projected cases, we find that COVID-19-related losses in market value at the firm level rise with capital intensity and leverage, and are deeper in industries more conducive to disease transmission. These relationships provide important insight into current record job losses. Measuring US states' drops in market value as the employment weighted average declines of the industries they produce, we find that states with milder drops in market value exhibit larger initial jobless claims per worker. This initially counter-intuitive result suggests that investors value the relative ease with which labor versus capital costs can be shed as revenues decline.\n
26950.zh_abstract: 我们表明，COVID-19感染轨迹的意外变化可以实时预测美国股票回报。参数估计表明，预期感染人数的意外翻倍（减半）预示着美国整体市场价值次日下降（上升）4%至11%，这表明即使感染人数继续上升，如果疾病轨迹变得比最初预期的温和，股票市场也可能开始反弹。利用相同的意外预期病例变化，我们发现公司层面因COVID-19导致的市场价值损失随着资本密集度和杠杆率而上升，并且在更有利于疾病传播的行业中更深。这些关系为当前创纪录的失业提供了重要见解。通过衡量美国各州市场价值下降（作为其生产行业的就业加权平均下降），我们发现市场价值下降较温和的州，每位工人的初始失业救济申请数量更大。这个最初反直觉的结果表明，投资者看重的是，当收入下降时，劳动力成本相对于资本成本更容易被削减。

26949.title: How Does Household Spending Respond to an Epidemic? Consumption During the 2020 COVID-19 Pandemic
26949.zh_title: 家庭支出如何应对流行病？2020年COVID-19大流行期间的消费
26949.authors: Scott R. Baker, R.A. Farrokhnia, Steffen Meyer, Michaela Pagel, Constantine Yannelis
26949.abstract: We explore how household consumption responds to epidemics, utilizing transaction-level household financial data to investigate the impact of the COVID-19 virus. As the number of cases grew, households began to radically alter their typical spending across a number of major categories. Initially spending increased sharply, particularly in retail, credit card spending and food items. This was followed by a sharp decrease in overall spending. Households responded most strongly in states with shelter-in-place orders in place by March 29th. We explore heterogeneity across partisan affiliation, demographics and income. Greater levels of social distancing are associated with drops in spending, particularly in restaurants and retail.
26949.zh_abstract: 我们利用交易层面的家庭财务数据，探讨家庭消费如何应对流行病，以调查COVID-19病毒的影响。随着病例数量的增加，家庭开始在许多主要类别中彻底改变其典型支出。最初支出急剧增加，特别是在零售、信用卡支出和食品项目上。随后是总体支出的急剧下降。在截至3月29日已实施居家令的州，家庭反应最为强烈。我们探讨了党派归属、人口统计特征和收入之间的异质性。更大程度的社会疏离与支出下降相关，尤其是在餐馆和零售领域。

26948.title: How Many Jobs Can be Done at Home?
26948.zh_title: 有多少工作可以在家完成？
26948.abstract: Evaluating the economic impact of "social distancing" measures taken to arrest the spread of COVID-19 raises a fundamental question about the modern economy: how many jobs can be performed at home? We classify the feasibility of working at home for all occupations and merge this classification with occupational employment counts. We find that 37 percent of jobs in the United States can be performed entirely at home, with significant variation across cities and industries. These jobs typically pay more than jobs that cannot be done at home and account for 46 percent of all US wages. Applying our occupational classification to 85 other countries reveals that lower-income economies have a lower share of jobs that can be done at home.
26948.zh_abstract: 评估为遏制COVID-19传播而采取的“社交距离”措施的经济影响，引发了一个关于现代经济的基本问题：有多少工作可以在家完成？我们对所有职业在家工作的可行性进行了分类，并将此分类与职业就业人数相结合。我们发现，美国37%的工作可以完全在家完成，不同城市和行业之间存在显著差异。这些工作的薪酬通常高于无法在家完成的工作，并占美国所有工资总额的46%。将我们的职业分类应用于其他85个国家，结果显示，低收入经济体中可在家完成的工作比例较低。
26948.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：D24, J22, J61, O30, R12, R32

26947.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on Gender Equality
26947.authors: Titan Alon, Matthias Doepke, Jane Olmstead-Rumsey, Michèle Tertilt
26947.abstract: The economic downturn caused by the current COVID-19 outbreak has substantial implications for gender equality, both during the downturn and the subsequent recovery. Compared to “regular” recessions, which affect men’s employment more severely than women’s employment, the employment drop related to social distancing measures has a large impact on sectors with high female employment shares. In addition, closures of schools and daycare centers have massively increased child care needs, which has a particularly large impact on working mothers. The effects of the crisis on working mothers are likely to be persistent, due to high returns to experience in the labor market. Beyond the immediate crisis, there are opposing forces which may ultimately promote gender equality in the labor market. First, businesses are rapidly adopting flexible work arrangements, which are likely to persist. Second, there are also many fathers who now have to take primary responsibility for child care, which may erode social norms that currently lead to a lopsided distribution of the division of labor in house work and child care.
26947.zh_abstract: 当前COVID-19疫情引发的经济衰退，在衰退期间及随后的复苏过程中，都对性别平等产生了重大影响。与“常规”衰退（对男性就业的影响比女性更严重）相比，与社交距离措施相关的就业下降对女性就业份额高的行业影响巨大。此外，学校和日托中心的关闭极大地增加了儿童保育需求，这对在职母亲的影响尤为显著。由于劳动力市场经验的回报率很高，危机对在职母亲的影响可能持续存在。在危机之外，存在一些可能最终促进劳动力市场性别平等的相反力量。首先，企业正在迅速采用灵活的工作安排，这些安排可能会持续下去。其次，现在许多父亲不得不承担起儿童保育的主要责任，这可能会侵蚀当前导致家务劳动和儿童保育分工不平衡的社会规范。

26946.title: Polarization and Public Health: Partisan Differences in Social Distancing during the Coronavirus Pandemic
26946.zh_title: 极化与公共卫生：冠状病毒大流行期间社交距离的党派差异
26946.authors: Hunt Allcott, Levi Boxell, Jacob C. Conway, Matthew Gentzkow, Michael Thaler, David Y. Yang
26946.abstract: We study partisan differences in Americans’ response to the COVID-19 pandemic. Political leaders and media outlets on the right and left have sent divergent messages about the severity of the crisis, which could impact the extent to which Republicans and Democrats engage in social distancing and other efforts to reduce disease transmission. We develop a simple model of a pandemic response with heterogeneous agents that clarifies the causes and consequences of heterogeneous responses. We use location data from a large sample of smartphones to show that areas with more Republicans engaged in less social distancing, controlling for other factors including public policies, population density, and local COVID cases and deaths. We then present new survey evidence of significant gaps at the individual level between Republicans and Democrats in self-reported social distancing, beliefs about personal COVID risk, and beliefs about the future severity of the pandemic.
26946.zh_abstract: 我们研究了美国人对COVID-19疫情反应的党派差异。右翼和左翼的政治领导人和媒体机构对危机的严重性发出了不同的信息，这可能影响共和党人和民主党人参与社交距离和其他减少疾病传播努力的程度。我们建立了一个具有异质性主体的疫情应对简单模型，阐明了异质性反应的原因和后果。我们使用来自大量智能手机样本的位置数据表明，在控制其他因素（包括公共政策、人口密度以及当地COVID病例和死亡人数）的情况下，共和党人比例更高的地区社交距离程度更低。然后，我们提出了新的调查证据，显示在个人层面，共和党人和民主党人在自我报告的社交距离、对个人COVID风险的信念以及对疫情未来严重性的信念方面存在显著差距。
26946.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, I12, I18

26945.title: The Unprecedented Stock Market Impact of COVID-19
26945.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Kyle J. Kost, Marco C. Sammon, Tasaneeya Viratyosin
26945.abstract: No previous infectious disease outbreak, including the Spanish Flu, has impacted the stock market as forcefully as the COVID-19 pandemic. In fact, previous pandemics left only mild traces on the U.S. stock market. We use text-based methods to develop these points with respect to large daily stock market moves back to 1900 and with respect to overall stock market volatility back to 1985. We also evaluate potential explanations for the unprecedented stock market reaction to the COVID-19 pandemic. The evidence we amass suggests that government restrictions on commercial activity and voluntary social distancing, operating with powerful effects in a service-oriented economy, are the main reasons the U.S. stock market reacted so much more forcefully to COVID-19 than to previous pandemics in 1918-19, 1957-58 and 1968.
26945.zh_abstract: 以往任何传染病疫情，包括西班牙流感，都没有像COVID-19大流行那样对股市产生如此强烈的影响。事实上，以往的疫情只在美国股市留下了轻微的痕迹。我们使用基于文本的方法，针对1900年以来股市的大幅日波动以及1985年以来的整体股市波动率，阐述了这些观点。我们还评估了对COVID-19大流行导致股市出现前所未有的反应的可能解释。我们收集的证据表明，政府对商业活动的限制和自愿的社交距离，在一个以服务为导向的经济中发挥着强大的作用，是美国股市对COVID-19的反应比以往1918-19年、1957-58年和1968年疫情强烈得多的主要原因。

26944.title: Quitting in Protest: Presidential Policymaking and Civil Service Response
26944.zh_title: 以辞职抗议：总统决策与公务员回应
26944.authors: Charles Cameron, John M. de Figueiredo
26944.abstract: We formally model the impact of presidential policymaking on the willingness of bureaucrats to exert effort and stay in the government. In the model, centralized policy initiative by the president demotivates policy-oriented bureaucrats and can impel them to quit rather than implicate themselves in presidentially imposed policies they dislike. Those most likely to quit are a range of moderate bureaucrats. More extreme bureaucrats may be willing to wait out an incumbent president in the hope of shaping future policy. As control of the White House alternates between ideologically opposed extreme presidents, policy-minded moderates depart from bureaucratic agencies leaving only policy extremists or poorly performing "slackers." The consequences for policy making are substantial. Despite these adverse consequences, presidents have strong incentives to engage in centralized policymaking.
26944.zh_abstract: 我们正式建模分析了总统决策对公务员努力意愿和留任政府意愿的影响。在该模型中，总统的集中政策倡议会削弱以政策为导向的公务员的积极性，并可能促使他们辞职，而不是卷入他们不喜欢的总统强加的政策中。最有可能辞职的是一系列温和派公务员。更极端的公务员可能愿意等待现任总统下台，以期塑造未来的政策。当白宫控制权在意识形态对立的极端总统之间交替时，以政策为导向的温和派会离开官僚机构，只留下政策极端分子或表现不佳的“懒散者”。这对政策制定的影响是巨大的。尽管存在这些不利后果，总统仍有强烈的动机进行集中决策。
26944.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE；JEL：H11, H83, J45, K00

26943.title: The Murder-Suicide of the Rentier: Population Aging and the Risk Premium
26943.zh_title: 食利者的谋杀式自杀：人口老龄化与风险溢价
26943.abstract: Population aging has been linked to global declines in real interest rates. A similar trend is seen for equity risk premia, which are on the rise. An existing literature can explain part of the declining trend in safe rates using demographics, but has no mechanism to speak to trends in relative returns on different assets. We calibrate a heterogeneous agent life-cycle model with equity markets and aggregate risk, and we show that aging demographics can simultaneously account for both the majority of a downward trend in the risk free rate, while also increasing the return premium attached to risky assets. This is because the life-cycle savings dynamics that have been well documented exert less pressure on risky assets as older households shift away from risk. Under reasonable calibrations we find declines in the safe rate that are considerably larger than most existing estimates between the years 1990 and 2017. We are also able to account for most of the rise in the equity risk premium. Projecting forward to 2050 we show that persistent demographic forces will continue push the risk free rate further into negative territory, while the equity risk premium remains elevated.
26943.zh_abstract: 人口老龄化与全球实际利率的下降有关。股票风险溢价也呈现出类似的趋势，但方向相反，即正在上升。现有文献可以用人口统计学解释安全利率下降趋势的一部分，但无法解释不同资产相对回报率的趋势。我们校准了一个包含股票市场和总体风险的异质性主体生命周期模型，并表明老龄化的人口结构可以同时解释无风险利率下降趋势的大部分，同时增加风险资产的回报溢价。这是因为，随着老年家庭远离风险，已有充分记录的生命周期储蓄动态对风险资产施加的压力较小。在合理的校准下，我们发现1990年至2017年间安全利率的下降幅度远大于大多数现有估计。我们还能够解释股票风险溢价上升的大部分原因。展望2050年，我们表明持续的人口力量将继续推动无风险利率进一步进入负值区域，而股票风险溢价仍将居高不下。
26943.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E21, E43, G11, J11

26942.title: Is the Social Safety Net a Long-Term Investment? Large-Scale Evidence from the Food Stamps Program
26942.zh_title: 社会安全网是长期投资吗？来自食品券计划的大规模证据
26942.authors: Martha J. Bailey, Hilary W. Hoynes, Maya Rossin-Slater, Reed Walker
26942.abstract: We use novel, large-scale data on 43 million Americans from the 2000 Census and the 2001 to 2013 American Communities Survey linked to the Social Security Administration’s NUMIDENT to study how a policy-driven increase in economic resources for families affects children’s long-term outcomes. Using variation from the county-level roll-out of the Food Stamps program between 1961 and 1975, we find that children with access to greater economic resources before age five experience an increase of 6 percent of a standard deviation in their adult human capital, 3 percent of a standard deviation in their adult economic self-sufficiency, 8 percent of a standard deviation in the quality of their adult neighborhoods, 0.4 percentage-point increase in longevity, and a 0.5 percentage-point decrease in likelihood of being incarcerated. Based on these estimates, we conclude that Food Stamps’ transfer of resources to families is a highly cost-effective investment into young children, yielding a marginal value of public funds of approximately 56.
26942.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自2000年人口普查和2001年至2013年美国社区调查的4300万美国人的新颖大规模数据，并与社会保障局的NUMIDENT数据库相关联，研究政策驱动的家庭经济资源增加如何影响儿童的长期结果。利用1961年至1975年间县级食品券计划推广的差异，我们发现，五岁前获得更多经济资源的儿童，其成年后人力资本提高6%个标准差，成年经济自给自足能力提高3%个标准差，成年社区质量提高8%个标准差，寿命增加0.4个百分点，被监禁的可能性降低0.5个百分点。基于这些估计，我们得出结论，食品券向家庭转移资源是一项对幼儿极具成本效益的投资，其公共资金的边际价值约为56。

26941.title: The Saving Glut of the Rich
26941.authors: Atif R. Mian, Ludwig Straub, Amir Sufi
26941.abstract: This paper develops a new unveiling methodology to trace distributional household saving through the financial system and applies it to tax records from 1963 to 2019. Since the 1980s, saving by the top 1% has surged, creating a saving glut of the rich comparable in scale to the global saving glut and equally influential in driving the demand for safe assets. Unveiling the financial sector reveals that this glut financed much of the rise in middle-class borrowing before 2008 and the expansion of federal debt thereafter. Our framework helps illustrate how rising inequality reshapes financial intermediation and debt dynamics.
26941.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种新的揭示方法，用于追踪家庭储蓄在金融体系中的分布情况，并将其应用于1963年至2019年的税收记录。自20世纪80年代以来，顶层1%人群的储蓄激增，形成了与全球储蓄过剩规模相当且对安全资产需求影响同样巨大的富人储蓄过剩。揭示金融部门后发现，这种过剩为2008年前中产阶级借贷的增长以及此后联邦债务的扩张提供了大部分资金。我们的框架有助于说明日益加剧的不平等如何重塑金融中介和债务动态。
26941.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D31, E21, E44, G51

26940.title: Indebted Demand
26940.authors: Atif R. Mian, Ludwig Straub, Amir Sufi
26940.abstract: We propose a theory of indebted demand, capturing the idea that large debt burdens by households and governments lower aggregate demand, and thus natural interest rates. At the core of the theory is the simple yet under-appreciated observation that borrowers and savers differ in their marginal propensities to save out of permanent income. Embedding this insight in a two-agent overlapping-generations model, we find that recent trends in income inequality and financial liberalization lead to indebted household demand, pushing down natural interest rates. Moreover, popular expansionary policies—such as accommodative monetary policy and deficit spending—generate a debt-financed short-run boom at the expense of indebted demand in the future. When demand is sufficiently indebted, the economy gets stuck in a debt-driven liquidity trap, or debt trap. Escaping a debt trap requires consideration of less standard macroeconomic policies, such as those focused on redistribution or those reducing the structural sources of high inequality.
26940.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种负债需求理论，旨在捕捉家庭和政府巨额债务负担会降低总需求，从而降低自然利率这一观点。该理论的核心是一个简单但未被充分认识的观察：借款人和储蓄者在永久收入的边际储蓄倾向方面存在差异。将这一见解嵌入一个两主体世代交叠模型中，我们发现，近期的收入不平等和金融自由化趋势导致了家庭负债需求，从而压低了自然利率。此外，流行的扩张性政策——如宽松的货币政策和赤字支出——会产生债务融资的短期繁荣，但代价是未来的负债需求。当需求负债过高时，经济会陷入债务驱动的流动性陷阱，即债务陷阱。摆脱债务陷阱需要考虑非标准的宏观经济政策，例如那些侧重于再分配或减少高不平等结构性根源的政策。
26940.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME；JEL：D31, E21, E32, E43, E44, E52, E62, G51

26939.title: Decomposing the Fiscal Multiplier
26939.authors: James S. Cloyne, Òscar Jordà, Alan M. Taylor
26939.abstract: The fiscal “multiplier” seeks to measure how many additional dollars of output are gained or lost for each dollar of fiscal expansion or contraction. In practice, the multiplier at any point in time depends on the monetary policy response and existing conditions in the economy. Using the IMF fiscal consolidations dataset for identification and a new decomposition-based approach, we show how to quantify the importance of these monetary-fiscal interactions. In the data, the fiscal multiplier varies considerably with monetary policy: it can be as small as zero, or as large as 2, depending on the monetary offset. More generally, we show how to decompose the typical macro impulse response function by extending local projections to carry out the well-known Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca decomposition. This provides a convenient way to evaluate the effects of policy, state-dependence, time-variation, and the balance conditions for identification.
26939.zh_abstract: 财政“乘数”旨在衡量每增加或减少一美元财政支出，产出相应增加或减少多少美元。在实践中，任何时点的乘数都取决于货币政策反应和经济的现有状况。利用国际货币基金组织的财政整顿数据集进行识别，并采用一种新的基于分解的方法，我们展示了如何量化这些货币-财政相互作用的重要性。在数据中，财政乘数随货币政策变化显著：根据货币抵消的程度，它可以小至零，或大至2。更一般地，我们通过扩展局部投影法来执行著名的Kitagawa-Blinder-Oaxaca分解，从而展示了如何分解典型的宏观脉冲响应函数。这提供了一种便捷的方法来评估政策效应、状态依赖性、时变性以及识别的平衡条件。
26939.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C54, C99, E32, E62, H20, H5, N10

26938.title: Social Insurance and Public Assistance in the Twentieth-Century United States: 2019 Presidential Address for the Economic History Association
26938.zh_title: 二十世纪美国的社会保险与公共援助：2019年经济史协会主席演讲
26938.abstract: The growth of American governments in the twentieth century included large increases in funds for social insurance and public assistance. Social insurance has increased far more than public assistance, so “rise in the social insurance state” is a far better description of the century than “rise in the welfare state.” The United States has increased total spending in these areas as much or more as have European countries, but the U.S. spending has relied less heavily on government programs. The U.S. really has 51 different social welfare systems, and I develop estimates of these benefits across time and place and compare them to the poverty line, manufacturing earnings and benefits, state per capita incomes in the US, as well as GDP per capita in countries throughout the world.
26938.zh_abstract: 二十世纪美国政府的扩张包括用于社会保险和公共援助资金的大幅增加。社会保险的增长远大于公共援助，因此“社会保险国家的兴起”比“福利国家的兴起”更能描述这个世纪。美国在这些领域的总支出与欧洲国家一样多甚至更多，但美国的支出对政府项目的依赖程度较低。美国实际上有51种不同的社会福利体系，我们估算了这些福利在不同时间和地点的水平，并将其与贫困线、制造业收入和福利、美国各州人均收入以及世界各国的人均GDP进行了比较。

26937.title: The Rise of American Minimum Wages, 1912-1968
26937.abstract: We describe the economic history of the rise of the American minimum wage between 1910 and 1968. Each new FLSA amendment led to a new peak in the real purchasing power of the national minimum. Exemptions to the FLSA were progressively closed and the share of workers covered finally increased from about 50 percent of the private sector workforce in 1937, to 77 percent of the private sector and 40 percent of the public sector workforce in 1966. By the late 1970s coverage was nearly complete, with only the smallest employers exempted. We describe the political economic history of the minimum wage laws, as well as the debates among economists. Another key feature is a renewed emphasis on the roles played by the states in passing the original minimum wage laws for women. The states filled some of the gaps in coverage left by the FLSA after 1938 and set higher minimum rates for women in some sectors in the 1940s and 1950s than the FLSA set for men and women in interstate commerce. Since 1981 a rising number of states have set general minimum wages that substantially exceed the national minimum.
26937.zh_abstract: 我们描述了1910年至1968年间美国最低工资兴起的经济史。每次新的《公平劳动标准法》修正案都导致全国最低工资实际购买力达到新的峰值。对《公平劳动标准法》的豁免被逐步取消，受覆盖工人比例最终从1937年约占私营部门劳动力的50%，增加到1966年占私营部门劳动力的77%和公共部门劳动力的40%。到20世纪70年代末，覆盖范围几乎完整，只有最小的雇主被豁免。我们描述了最低工资法的政治经济史，以及经济学家之间的辩论。另一个关键特征是重新强调了各州在通过最初的女性最低工资法中所扮演的角色。各州填补了1938年后《公平劳动标准法》留下的一些覆盖空白，并在20世纪40年代和50年代为某些行业的女性设定了比《公平劳动标准法》为州际商业中的男性和女性设定的更高的最低工资率。自1981年以来，越来越多的州设定了大幅超过全国最低工资的通用最低工资。

26936.title: Discrimination, Migration, and Economic Outcomes: Evidence from World War I
26936.zh_title: 歧视、移民与经济结果：来自第一次世界大战的证据
26936.abstract: Are the costs of discrimination mainly borne by the targeted group or by society? This paper examines both individual and aggregate costs of ethnic discrimination. Studying Germans living in the U.S. during World War I, an event that abruptly downgraded their previously high social standing, we propose a novel measure of local anti-German sentiment based on war casualties. We show that Germans disproportionally fled counties with high casualty rates and that those counties saw more anti-German slurs reported in newspapers. German movers had worse occupational outcomes after the war but also the discriminating communities paid a substantial cost. Counties with larger outflows of Germans, who pre-war tended to be well-trained manufacturing workers, saw a drop in average annual manufacturing wages of 1-7% which persisted until 1940. Thus, for discriminating communities, a few years of intense anti-German sentiment were reflected in worse economic outcomes that lasted for more than a decade.
26936.zh_abstract: 歧视的成本主要由目标群体承担还是由社会承担？本文考察了种族歧视的个人成本和总体成本。以第一次世界大战期间居住在美国的德国人为研究对象，这一事件突然降低了他们先前较高的社会地位，我们基于战争伤亡提出了一种新的当地反德情绪衡量指标。我们表明，德国人不成比例地逃离了伤亡率高的县，并且这些县在报纸上出现了更多反德诽谤报道。战后，迁移的德国人职业结果更差，但歧视性社区也付出了巨大代价。德国人（战前往往是训练有素的制造业工人）外流较多的县，其制造业平均年工资下降了1-7%，并持续到1940年。因此，对于歧视性社区而言，几年的强烈反德情绪反映在持续十多年更糟糕的经济结果上。
26936.meta: Programs：DAE, LS；JEL：J15, J61, J71, N32, N42

26935.title: Estimating Macroeconomic Models of Financial Crises: An Endogenous Regime-Switching Approach
26935.zh_title: 估计金融危机宏观经济模型：一种内生体制转换方法
26935.authors: Gianluca Benigno, Andrew Foerster, Christopher Otrok, Alessandro Rebucci
26935.abstract: We estimate a workhorse DSGE model with an occasionally binding borrowing constraint. First, we propose a new specification of the occasionally binding constraint, where the transition between the unconstrained and constrained states is a stochastic function of the leverage level and the constraint multiplier. This specification maps into an endogenous regime-switching model. Second, we develop a general perturbation method for the solution of such a model. Third, we estimate the model with Bayesian methods to fit Mexico's business cycle and financial crisis history since 1981. The estimated model fits the data well, identifying three crisis episodes of varying duration and intensity: the Debt Crisis in the early-1980s, the Peso Crisis in the mid-1990s, and the Global Financial Crisis in the late-2000s. The crisis episodes generated by the estimated model display sluggish and long-lasting build-up and stagnation phases driven by plausible combinations of shocks. Different sets of shocks explain different variables over the business cycle and the three historical episodes of sudden stops identified.
26935.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个具有偶尔有约束力的借贷约束的标准动态随机一般均衡模型。首先，我们提出了一个偶尔有约束力约束的新规范，其中无约束状态和有约束状态之间的转换是杠杆水平和约束乘数的随机函数。这种规范映射到一个内生体制转换模型。其次，我们开发了一种通用的摄动方法来解决此类模型。第三，我们使用贝叶斯方法估计该模型，以拟合自1981年以来墨西哥的商业周期和金融危机历史。估计模型很好地拟合了数据，识别了三个不同持续时间和强度的危机事件：20世纪80年代初的债务危机、20世纪90年代中期的比索危机和21世纪后期的全球金融危机。估计模型产生的危机事件显示出缓慢且持久的积累和停滞阶段，这些阶段由合理的冲击组合驱动。不同的冲击组合解释了商业周期以及所识别的三个历史性突然停止事件中不同变量的变化。
26935.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：C11, E30, F41, G01

26934.title: Longer-run Economic Consequences of Pandemics
26934.zh_title: 大流行的长期经济后果
26934.authors: Òscar Jordà, Sanjay R. Singh, Alan M. Taylor
26934.abstract: What are the medium- to long-term effects of pandemics? How do they differ from other economic disasters? We study major pandemics using the rates of return on assets stretching back to the 14th century. Significant macroeconomic after-effects of pandemics persist for about decades, with real rates of return substantially depressed, in stark contrast to what happens after wars. Our findings are consistent with the neoclassical growth model: capital is destroyed in wars, but not in pandemics; pandemics instead may induce relative labor scarcity and/or a shift to greater precautionary savings.
26934.zh_abstract: 大流行的中长期影响是什么？它们与其他经济灾难有何不同？我们利用可追溯到14世纪的资产回报率来研究重大大流行。大流行的显著宏观经济后遗症持续约数十年，实际回报率大幅下降，这与战争后的情况形成鲜明对比。我们的发现与新古典增长模型一致：战争摧毁资本，但大流行不会；大流行反而可能导致相对劳动力稀缺和/或转向更高的预防性储蓄。
26934.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E43, F41, N10, N30, N40

26933.title: Changes in Assortative Matching and Inequality in Income: Evidence for the UK
26933.zh_title: 英国同质婚配与收入不平等的变化
26933.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Monica Costa Dias, Sam Crossman, Costas Meghir
26933.abstract: The extent to which like-with like marry is important for inequality as well as for the outcomes of children that result from the union. In this paper we present evidence on changes in assortative mating and its implications for household inequality in the UK. Our approach contrasts with others in the literature in that it is consistent with an underlying model of the marriage market. We argue that a key advantage of this approach is that it creates a direct connection between changes in assortativeness in marriage and changes in the value of marriage for the various possible matches by education group. Our empirical results do not show a clear direction in the change in assortativeness in the UK, between the birth cohorts of 1945-54 and 1965-74. We find that changes in assortativeness pushed income inequality up slightly, but that the strong changes in education attainment across the two cohorts contributed to scale down inequality.
26933.zh_abstract: 同类人结婚的程度对不平等以及由此产生的子女结果都很重要。在本文中，我们提供了英国同质婚配变化及其对家庭不平等影响的证据。我们的方法与文献中的其他方法不同，因为它与婚姻市场的潜在模型一致。我们认为，这种方法的一个关键优势是，它在婚姻同质性的变化与按教育群体划分的各种可能匹配的婚姻价值变化之间建立了直接联系。我们的实证结果并未显示，在1945-54年和1965-74年出生队列之间，英国同质婚配的变化有明确方向。我们发现，同质婚配的变化略微推高了收入不平等，但两个队列之间教育程度的强烈变化有助于缩小不平等。
26933.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：H31, I24, I3, J1, J11, J12

26932.title: Changes in Assortative Matching: Theory and Evidence for the US
26932.zh_title: 同质婚配的变化：美国理论与证据
26932.authors: Pierre-André Chiappori, Monica Costa Dias, Costas Meghir
26932.abstract: The extent to which like-with like marry is particularly important for inequality as well as for the outcomes of children that result from the union. In this paper we discuss approaches to the measurement of changes in assortative mating. We derive two key conditions that a well-defined measure should satisfy. We argue that changes in assortativeness should be interpreted through a structural model of the marriage market; in particular, a crucial issue is how they relate to variations in the economic surplus generated by marriage. We propose a very general criterion of increase in assortativeness, and show that almost all indices used in the literature are implied by our criterion with one notable exception, that moreover violates one of our conditions. Finally, we use our approach to evaluate the evolution of assortative matching in the US over the last decades, and conclude that assortative matching has increased, particularly at the top of the education distribution.
26932.zh_abstract: 同类相配的程度对不平等以及由此产生的子女结果尤为重要。本文讨论了衡量婚配匹配度变化的方法。我们推导出一个良好定义的衡量标准应满足的两个关键条件。我们认为，婚配匹配度的变化应通过婚姻市场的结构模型来解释；特别地，一个关键问题是这些变化如何与婚姻产生的经济剩余变化相关联。我们提出了一个非常普遍的匹配度增加标准，并表明文献中使用的几乎所有指标都隐含在我们的标准中，但有一个显著的例外，该例外还违反了我们的一个条件。最后，我们利用我们的方法评估了过去几十年美国同质婚配的演变，并得出结论认为同质婚配有所增加，尤其是在教育分布的顶端。
26932.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：J01, J11, J12

26931.title: Culture and Gender Allocation of Tasks: Source Country Characteristics and the Division of Non-market Work among US Immigrants
26931.zh_title: 文化与性别任务分配：来源国特征与美国移民中非市场工作的分工
26931.authors: Francine D. Blau, Lawrence Kahn, Matthew L. Comey, Amanda R. Eng, Pamela A. Meyerhofer, Alexander Willén
26931.abstract: There is a well-known gender difference in time allocation within the household, which has important implications for gender differences in labor market outcomes. We ask how malleable this gender difference in time allocation is to culture. In particular, we ask if US immigrants allocate tasks differently depending upon the characteristics of the source countries from which they emigrated. Using data from the 2003-2017 waves of the American Time Use Survey (ATUS), we find that first-generation immigrants, both women and men, from source countries with more gender equality (as measured by the World Economic Forum’s Global Gender Gap Index) allocate tasks more equally, while those from less gender equal source countries allocate tasks more traditionally. These results are robust to controls for immigration cohort, years since migration, and other own and spouse characteristics. There is also some indication of an effect of parent source country gender equality for second-generation immigrants, particularly for second-generation men with children. Our findings suggest that broader cultural factors do influence the gender division of labor in the household.
26931.zh_abstract: 家庭内部时间分配存在众所周知的性别差异，这对劳动力市场结果的性别差异具有重要影响。我们探究这种时间分配的性别差异在多大程度上受文化影响。具体而言，我们研究美国移民是否根据其移出国的特征而不同地分配任务。利用2003-2017年美国时间使用调查（ATUS）的数据，我们发现，来自性别更平等来源国（以世界经济论坛全球性别差距指数衡量）的第一代移民，无论男女，都更平等地分配任务，而来自性别较不平等来源国的移民则更传统地分配任务。这些结果在控制了移民群体、移民年限以及其他自身和配偶特征后仍然稳健。也有迹象表明，父母来源国的性别平等对第二代移民有影响，尤其是有孩子的第二代男性。我们的研究结果表明，更广泛的文化因素确实会影响家庭内部的性别分工。

26930.title: How Political Insiders Lose Out When International Aid Underperforms: Evidence from a Participatory Development Experiment in Ghana
26930.zh_title: 当国际援助表现不佳时，政治内部人士如何受损：来自加纳参与式发展实验的证据
26930.authors: Kate Baldwin, Dean Karlan, Christopher R. Udry, Ernest Appiah
26930.abstract: Participatory development is designed to mitigate problems of political bias in pre-existing local government but also interacts with it in complex ways. Using a five-year randomized controlled study in 97 clusters of villages (194 villages) in Ghana, we analyze the effects of a major participatory development program on participation in, leadership of and investment by preexisting political institutions, and on households’ overall socioeconomic well-being. Applying theoretical insights on political participation and redistributive politics, we consider the possibility of both cross-institutional mobilization and displacement, and heterogeneous effects by partisanship. We find the government and its political supporters acted with high expectations for the participatory approach: treatment led to increased participation in local governance and reallocation of resources. But the results did not meet expectations, resulting in a worsening of socioeconomic wellbeing in treatment versus control villages for government supporters. This demonstrates international aid’s complex distributional consequences.
26930.zh_abstract: 参与式发展旨在缓解现有地方政府中政治偏袒的问题，但也与之以复杂的方式相互作用。通过在加纳97个村庄群（194个村庄）进行的一项为期五年的随机对照研究，我们分析了一个大型参与式发展项目对现有政治机构的参与、领导、投资以及家庭整体社会经济福祉的影响。运用关于政治参与和再分配政治的理论见解，我们考虑了跨机构动员和替代的可能性，以及按党派归属划分的异质性效应。我们发现政府及其政治支持者对参与式方法抱有很高期望：处理导致了地方治理参与度的提高和资源的重新分配。但结果未达到预期，导致政府支持者在处理村与对照村相比社会经济福祉恶化。这展示了国际援助复杂的分配后果。
26930.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：H4, H7, O12, O17, O19

26929.title: The Brazilian Bombshell? The Long-Term Impact of the 1918 Influenza Pandemic the South American Way
26929.zh_title: 巴西炸弹？1918年流感大流行的南美式长期影响
26929.authors: Amanda Guimbeau, Nidhiya Menon, Aldo Musacchio
26929.abstract: We analyze the repercussions of the 1918 Influenza Pandemic on demographic measures, human capital formation, and productivity markers in the state of Sao Paulo, Brazil's financial center and the most populous city in South America today. Leveraging temporal and spatial variation in district-level estimates of influenza-related deaths for the period 1917-1920 combined with a unique database on socio-economic, health and productivity outcomes constructed from historical and contemporary documents for all districts in Sao Paulo, we find that the 1918 Influenza pandemic had significant negative impacts on infant mortality and sex ratios at birth in 1920 (the short-run). We find robust evidence of persistent effects on health, educational attainment and productivity more than twenty years later. Our study highlights the importance of documenting the legacy of historical shocks in understanding the development trajectories of countries over time.
26929.zh_abstract: 我们分析了1918年流感大流行对巴西圣保罗州（巴西金融中心，也是当今南美洲人口最多的城市）的人口指标、人力资本形成和生产力标志的影响。利用1917-1920年期间地区层面流感相关死亡估计的时空变化，并结合根据圣保罗所有地区的历史和当代文献构建的社会经济、健康和生产力结果的独特数据库，我们发现1918年流感大流行对1920年（短期）的婴儿死亡率和出生性别比产生了显著的负面影响。我们发现了二十多年后对健康、教育程度和生产力的持续影响的稳健证据。我们的研究强调了记录历史冲击的遗产对于理解各国随时间发展轨迹的重要性。

26928.title: The Unintended Consequences of NGO-Provided Aid on Government Services in Uganda
26928.zh_title: 非政府组织提供的援助对乌干达政府服务的意外后果
26928.authors: Erika Deserranno, Aisha Nansamba, Nancy Qian
26928.abstract: This paper studies the impact of the entry of a large foreign NGO which provides basic health services on the government’s capacity to provide similar services in rural Uganda. In villages with a government health worker at baseline, the NGO hires the government worker in half of the villages it enters. Where “poaching” occurs, overall healthcare and infant mortality worsen. In villages where the NGO hires a second worker who is not the government worker, health outcomes improve. In villages with no government health worker at baseline, NGO entry improves healthcare and health outcomes, but increases the closure of village schools, the other public good that relies on skilled labor, and reduces school attendance. Our results support the concern that NGOs can have unintended adverse effects on government services in contexts where skilled labor is scarce.
26928.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一家提供基本医疗服务的大型外国非政府组织进入乌干达农村地区对政府提供类似服务能力的影响。在基线时拥有政府卫生工作者的村庄中，该非政府组织在其进入的一半村庄中雇佣了该政府工作者。在发生“挖角”的地方，整体医疗保健和婴儿死亡率恶化。在非政府组织雇佣了非政府工作者的第二名工人的村庄，健康结果得到改善。在基线时没有政府卫生工作者的村庄，非政府组织的进入改善了医疗保健和健康结果，但增加了村庄学校（另一种依赖熟练劳动力的公共品）的关闭，并降低了入学率。我们的结果支持了这样一种担忧：在熟练劳动力稀缺的环境中，非政府组织可能对政府服务产生意想不到的不利影响。

26927.title: Where Has All the Data Gone?
26927.authors: Maryam Farboodi, Adrien Matray, Laura Veldkamp, Venky Venkateswaran
26927.abstract: As financial technology improves and data becomes more abundant, do market prices reflect this data growth? While recent studies documented rises in the information content of prices, we show that, across asset types, there is data divergence. Large, growth stock prices increasingly reflect information about future firm earnings. This is the rise reflected in the previous studies. But over the same time period, the information content of small and value firm prices was flat or declining. Our structural estimation allows us to disentangle these informational trends from changing asset characteristics. These facts pose a new puzzle: Amidst the explosion of data processing, why has this data informed only the prices of a subset of firms, instead of benefiting the market as a whole? Our structural model offers a potential answer: Large growth firms' data grew in value, as big firms got bigger and growth magnified the effect of these changes in size.
26927.zh_abstract: 随着金融技术的改进和数据变得更加丰富，市场价格是否反映了这种数据增长？虽然最近的研究记录了价格信息含量的上升，但我们表明，在资产类型中，存在数据分化。大型成长股的价格越来越多地反映未来公司收益的信息。这是先前研究中反映的上升趋势。但在同一时期，小型和价值型公司价格的信息含量持平或下降。我们的结构估计使我们能够将这些信息趋势与不断变化的资产特征区分开来。这些事实提出了一个新的难题：在数据处理爆炸式增长的情况下，为什么这些数据只告知了一部分公司的价格，而不是惠及整个市场？我们的结构模型提供了一个可能的答案：大型成长型公司的数据价值增长，因为大公司变得更大，而增长放大了这些规模变化的影响。

26926.title: The Economic Impact of a High National Minimum Wage: Evidence from the 1966 Fair Labor Standards Act
26926.zh_title: 高国家最低工资的经济影响：来自1966年《公平劳动标准法》的证据
26926.authors: Martha J. Bailey, John DiNardo, Bryan A. Stuart
26926.abstract: This paper examines the short and longer-term economic effects of the 1966 Fair Labor Standards Act (FLSA) which increased the national minimum wage to its highest level of the 20th Century and extended coverage to an additional 9.1 million workers. Exploiting differences in the “bite” of the minimum wage due to regional variation in the standard of living and industry composition, this paper finds that the 1966 FLSA increased wages dramatically but reduced aggregate employment only modestly. However, the disemployment effects were significantly larger among African-American men, forty percent of whom earned below the new minimum wage in 1966.
26926.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1966年《公平劳动标准法》（FLSA）的短期和长期经济影响，该法案将国家最低工资提高到20世纪的最高水平，并将覆盖范围扩大到额外的910万工人。利用因地区生活水平和行业构成差异导致的最低工资“冲击”程度的不同，本文发现1966年FLSA大幅提高了工资，但仅适度减少了总就业。然而，非裔美国男性的就业减少效应显著更大，其中40%的人在1966年的收入低于新的最低工资。

26925.title: Public Information is an Incentive for Politicians: Experimental Evidence from Delhi Elections
26925.zh_title: 公共信息是对政治家的激励：来自德里选举的实验证据
26925.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Nils T. Enevoldsen, Rohini Pande, Michael Walton
26925.abstract: In 2010, we informed a random set of Delhi councilors, some ineligible for re-election in their current ward, that a newspaper would report on their performance shortly prior to the 2012 city elections. Using slum dwellers' spending preferences, we created a councilor-specific index of pro-poor spending. Treated councilors increased pro-poor spending in high-slum wards. Cross-cutting experiments suggest that the public nature of report cards, not access to information on public services per se, incentivized councilors. Data on party ticket allocation and electoral outcomes shows that, in low-information situations, credible public disclosures of politician achievements matters to both parties and voters.
26925.zh_abstract: 2010年，我们告知一组随机选取的德里市议员（其中一些人在其现任选区没有连任资格），一家报纸将在2012年市政选举前不久报道他们的表现。利用贫民窟居民的支出偏好，我们创建了一个针对市议员的亲贫支出指数。受到干预的市议员在高贫民窟选区增加了亲贫支出。交叉实验表明，激励市议员的是报告卡的公开性质，而非获取公共服务信息本身。关于政党选票分配和选举结果的数据显示，在信息匮乏的情况下，政治家成就的可靠公开披露对政党和选民都很重要。

26924.title: Productivity Dispersion and Persistence Among the World's Most Numerous Firms
26924.zh_title: 全球数量最多企业的生产率离散性与持续性
26924.authors: Casey C. Maue, Marshall Burke, Kyle J. Emerick
26924.abstract: A vast firm productivity literature finds that otherwise similar firms differ widely in their productivity and that these differences persist through time, with important implications for the broader macroeconomy. These stylized facts derive largely from studies of manufacturing firms in wealthy countries, and thus have unknown relevance for the world's most common firm type, the smallholder farm. We use detailed micro data from over 12,000 smallholder farms and nearly 100,000 agricultural plots across four countries in Africa to study the size, source, and persistence of productivity dispersion among smallholder farmers. Applying standard regression-based approaches to measuring productivity residuals, we find much larger dispersion but less persistence than benchmark estimates from manufacturing. We then show, using a novel framework that combines physical output measurement, estimates from satellites, and machine learning, that about half of this discrepancy can be accounted for by measurement error in output. After correcting for measurement error, productivity differences across firms and over time in our smallholder agricultural setting closely match benchmark estimates for non-agricultural firms. These results question some common implications of observed dispersion, such as the importance of misallocation of factors of production.
26924.zh_abstract: 大量关于企业生产率的研究发现，看似相似的企业在生产率上存在巨大差异，且这些差异会持续存在，对宏观经济具有重要影响。这些典型事实主要源于对富裕国家制造业企业的研究，因此对全球最常见的企业类型——小农户——的相关性尚不明确。我们利用来自非洲四国超过12,000个小农户和近100,000个农业地块的详细微观数据，研究小农户生产率离散性的规模、来源和持续性。采用基于回归的标准方法测量生产率残差，我们发现与制造业的基准估计相比，离散性更大但持续性更弱。随后，我们展示了一个结合物理产出测量、卫星估计和机器学习的新框架，约一半的差异可由产出测量误差解释。在纠正测量误差后，我们的小农户农业环境中企业间和跨时期的生产率差异与非农业企业的基准估计高度吻合。这些结果对观察到的离散性的一些常见含义（如生产要素错配的重要性）提出了质疑。

26923.title: The Economics of Tobacco Regulation: A Comprehensive Review
26923.zh_title: 烟草监管经济学：全面综述
26923.authors: Philip DeCicca, Donald S. Kenkel, Michael F. Lovenheim
26923.abstract: Tobacco regulation has been a major component of health policy in the developed world since the UK’s Royal College of Physicians’ and the U.S. Surgeon General’s reports in the 1960s. Such regulation, which has intensified in the past two decades, includes cigarette taxation, place-based smoking bans in areas ranging from bars and restaurants to workplaces, and regulations designed to make tobacco products less desirable. More recently, the availability of alternative products, most notably e-cigarettes, has increased dramatically, and these products are just starting to be regulated. Despite an extensive body of research on tobacco regulations, there remains substantial debate regarding their effectiveness, and ultimately, their impact on economic welfare. We provide the first comprehensive review of the state of research in the economics of tobacco regulation in two decades.
26923.zh_abstract: 自20世纪60年代英国皇家内科医学院和美国卫生局局长的报告以来，烟草监管一直是发达国家卫生政策的重要组成部分。这种监管在过去二十年中不断加强，包括卷烟税、基于场所的禁烟令（范围从酒吧和餐厅到工作场所），以及旨在降低烟草产品吸引力的法规。最近，替代产品（尤其是电子烟）的可获得性大幅增加，这些产品刚刚开始受到监管。尽管关于烟草监管的研究广泛，但其有效性以及对经济福利的最终影响仍存在重大争议。我们提供了二十年来烟草监管经济学研究状况的首次全面综述。

26922.title: Rational Heuristics? Expectations and Behaviors in Evolving Economies with Heterogeneous Interacting Agents
26922.zh_title: 理性启发式？异质性互动主体演化经济中的预期与行为
26922.authors: Giovanni Dosi, Mauro Napoletano, Andrea Roventini, Joseph E. Stiglitz, Tania Treibich
26922.abstract: We analyze the individual and macroeconomic impacts of heterogeneous expectations and action rules within an agent-based model populated by heterogeneous, interacting firms. Agents have to cope with a complex evolving economy characterized by deep uncertainty resulting from technical change, imperfect information, coordination hurdles and structural breaks. In these circumstances, we find that neither individual nor macroeconomic dynamics improve when agents replace myopic expectations with less naïve learning rules. Our results suggest that fast and frugal robust heuristics may not be a second-best option but rather “rational” responses in complex and changing macroeconomic environments.
26922.zh_abstract: 我们在一个由异质性、互动企业组成的基于主体的模型中，分析了异质性预期和行动规则对个体及宏观经济的影响。主体必须应对一个复杂的演化经济，其特征是由技术变革、不完全信息、协调障碍和结构性断裂导致的深度不确定性。在这些情况下，我们发现当主体用不那么天真的学习规则取代短视预期时，个体和宏观经济动态均未改善。我们的结果表明，快速而节俭的稳健启发式可能不是次优选择，而是在复杂且变化的宏观经济环境中的“理性”反应。

26921.title: Environmental Preferences and Technological Choices: Is Market Competition Clean or Dirty?
26921.zh_title: 环境偏好与技术选择：市场竞争是清洁还是肮脏？
26921.authors: Philippe Aghion, Roland Bénabou, Ralf Martin, Alexandra Roulet
26921.abstract: This paper investigates the joint effect of consumers' environmental concerns and product-market competition on firms' decisions whether to innovate “clean” or “dirty”. We first develop a step-by-step innovation model to capture the basic intuition that socially responsible consumers induce firms to escape competition by pursuing greener innovations. To test and quantify the theory, we bring together patent data, survey data on environmental values, and competition measures. Using a panel of 8,562 firms from the automobile sector that patented in 42 countries between 1998 and 2012, we indeed find that greater exposure to environmental attitudes has a significant positive effect on the probability for a firm to innovate in the clean direction, and all the more so the higher the degree of product market competition. Results suggest that the combination of historically realistic increases in prosocial attitudes and product market competition can have the same effect on green innovation as major increase in fuel prices.
26921.zh_abstract: 本文研究了消费者的环境关注与产品市场竞争对企业决定创新“清洁”还是“肮脏”的联合效应。我们首先开发了一个逐步创新模型，以捕捉基本直觉：具有社会责任感的消费者促使企业通过追求更绿色的创新来逃避竞争。为了检验和量化这一理论，我们整合了专利数据、环境价值观调查数据和竞争度量指标。利用1998年至2012年间在42个国家申请专利的汽车行业8,562家企业的面板数据，我们确实发现，对环境态度的更大暴露对企业向清洁方向创新的概率有显著正向影响，并且产品市场竞争程度越高，这种影响越强。结果表明，历史上现实增长的亲社会态度与产品市场竞争的结合，可以对绿色创新产生与燃料价格大幅上涨相同的效果。
26921.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG, IO, PE, POL；JEL：D21, D22, D62, D64, H23, O3, O31

26920.title: What Explains the Gender Gap in Wealth? Evidence from Administrative Data
26920.zh_title: 什么解释了财富中的性别差距？来自行政数据的证据
26920.authors: Jaanika Meriküll, Merike Kukk, Tairi Rõõm
26920.abstract: This paper studies the gender gap in net wealth. We use administrative data on wealth that are linked to the Estonian Household Finance and Consumption Survey, which provides individual-level wealth data for all household types. We find that the unconditional gender gap in mean wealth is 45% and that it is caused by large wealth disparities in the upper end of the wealth distribution. The structure of assets owned by men is more diversified than that for women. Men own more business assets and vehicles, while women own more deposits. The gender gaps in these asset components cannot be explained by observable characteristics. For partner-headed households the raw gender gaps across deciles are mostly in favour of men, and more strongly so for married couples, indicating that resources are not entirely pooled within households. For single-member households the raw gaps across quantiles are partially in favour of women. Accounting for observable characteristics renders the unexplained parts of the gaps mostly insignificant for all household types.
26920.zh_abstract: 本文研究了净财富中的性别差距。我们使用了与爱沙尼亚家庭金融与消费调查相关联的行政财富数据，该调查提供了所有家庭类型的个人层面财富数据。我们发现，平均财富的无条件性别差距为45%，这是由财富分布上端的巨大财富差异造成的。男性拥有的资产结构比女性更多元化。男性拥有更多的商业资产和车辆，而女性拥有更多的存款。这些资产组成部分的性别差距无法由可观察特征解释。对于有伴侣的家庭，各十分位数的原始性别差距大多有利于男性，已婚夫妇中更为明显，表明资源并未完全在家庭内共享。对于单身家庭，各分位数的原始差距部分有利于女性。考虑可观察特征后，所有家庭类型中差距的未解释部分大多变得不显著。

26919.title: Pareto-Improving Carbon-Risk Taxation
26919.zh_title: 帕累托改进的碳风险税
26919.authors: Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Felix Kubler, Andrey Polbin, Simon Scheidegger
26919.abstract: Anthropogenic climate change produces two conceptually distinct negative economic externalities. The first is an expected path of climate damage. The second, which is this paper's focus, is an expected path of economic risk. To isolate the climate-risk problem, we consider mean-zero, symmetric shocks in our 12-period, overlapping generations model. These shocks impact dirty energy usage (carbon emissions), the relationship between carbon concentration and temperature, and the connection between temperature and damages. Our model exhibits a de minimis climate problem absent its shocks. But due to non-linearities, symmetric shocks deliver negatively skewed impacts, including the potential for climate disasters. As we show, Pareto-improving carbon taxation can dramatically lower climate risk, in general, and disaster risk, in particular. The associated climate-risk tax, which is focused exclusively on limiting climate risk, can be as large or larger than the carbon average-damage tax, which is focused exclusively on limiting average damage.
26919.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化产生两种概念上不同的负经济外部性。第一种是预期的气候损害路径。第二种是本文关注的焦点：预期的经济风险路径。为了隔离气候风险问题，我们在12期世代交叠模型中考虑了均值为零的对称冲击。这些冲击影响肮脏能源使用（碳排放）、碳浓度与温度之间的关系，以及温度与损害之间的联系。我们的模型在没有冲击的情况下表现出极小的气候问题。但由于非线性，对称冲击会产生负偏态影响，包括气候灾难的可能性。正如我们所展示的，帕累托改进的碳税可以显著降低气候风险，特别是灾难风险。相关的气候风险税专注于限制气候风险，其规模可能等于或大于专注于限制平均损害的碳平均损害税。
26919.meta: Programs：EEE, IFM, LS, PE；JEL：F0, F20, H0, H2, H3, J20

26918.title: Macroeconomic Implications of COVID-19: Can Negative Supply Shocks Cause Demand Shortages?
26918.zh_title: COVID-19的宏观经济影响：负供给冲击能否导致需求短缺？
26918.authors: Veronica Guerrieri, Guido Lorenzoni, Ludwig Straub, Iván Werning
26918.abstract: We present a theory of Keynesian supply shocks: supply shocks that trigger changes in aggregate demand larger than the shocks themselves. We argue that the economic shocks associated to the COVID-19 epidemic—shutdowns, layoffs, and firm exits—may have this feature. In one-sector economies supply shocks are never Keynesian. We show that this is a general result that extend to economies with incomplete markets and liquidity constrained consumers. In economies with multiple sectors Keynesian supply shocks are possible, under some conditions. A 50% shock that hits all sectors is not the same as a 100% shock that hits half the economy. Incomplete markets make the conditions for Keynesian supply shocks more likely to be met. Firm exit and job destruction can amplify the initial effect, aggravating the recession. We discuss the effects of various policies. Standard fiscal stimulus can be less effective than usual because the fact that some sectors are shut down mutes the Keynesian multiplier feedback. Monetary policy, as long as it is unimpeded by the zero lower bound, can have magnified effects, by preventing firm exits. Turning to optimal policy, closing down contact-intensive sectors and providing full insurance payments to affected workers can achieve the first-best allocation, despite the lower per-dollar potency of fiscal policy.
26918.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种凯恩斯主义供给冲击理论：即引发总需求变化大于冲击本身的供给冲击。我们认为，与COVID-19疫情相关的经济冲击——停工、裁员和企业退出——可能具有这一特征。在单部门经济中，供给冲击从来不是凯恩斯主义的。我们证明，这是一个普遍结果，可扩展到具有不完全市场和流动性约束消费者的经济。在具有多个部门的经济中，凯恩斯主义供给冲击在某些条件下是可能的。冲击所有部门的50%冲击与冲击一半经济的100%冲击不同。不完全市场使凯恩斯主义供给冲击的条件更可能满足。企业退出和就业破坏会放大初始效应，加剧衰退。我们讨论了各种政策的效果。标准财政刺激可能不如平时有效，因为某些部门关闭会抑制凯恩斯乘数反馈。只要不受零下限阻碍，货币政策可以通过防止企业退出产生放大效应。关于最优政策，关闭接触密集型部门并向受影响工人提供全额保险支付可以实现最优配置，尽管财政政策的每美元效力较低。

26917.title: The Coronavirus Epidemic Curve is Already Flattening in New York City
26917.zh_title: 纽约市冠状病毒流行曲线已在趋平
26917.abstract: New York City has been rightly characterized as the epicenter of the coronavirus pandemic in the United States. Just one month after the first cases of coronavirus infection were reported in the city, the burden of infected individuals with serious complications of COVID-19 has already outstripped the capacity of many of the city’s hospitals. As in the case of most pandemics, scientists and public officials don’t have complete, accurate, real-time data on the path of new infections. Despite these data inadequacies, there already appears to be sufficient evidence to conclude that the curve in New York City is indeed flattening. The purpose of this report is to set forth the evidence for – and against – this preliminary but potentially important conclusion. Having examined the evidence, we then inquire: if the curve is indeed flattening, do we know what caused to it to level off?
26917.zh_abstract: 纽约市被恰当地描述为美国冠状病毒大流行的中心。在该市报告首例冠状病毒感染病例仅一个月后，出现COVID-19严重并发症的感染者负担已超过该市许多医院的承载能力。与大多数大流行一样，科学家和公职人员没有关于新感染路径的完整、准确、实时数据。尽管存在这些数据不足，但已有足够证据表明纽约市的曲线确实在趋平。本报告的目的是阐述支持——和反对——这一初步但可能重要结论的证据。在审查证据后，我们接着探究：如果曲线确实在趋平，我们是否知道是什么导致了它趋于平稳？

26990.title: The Geographic Spread of COVID-19 Correlates with the Structure of Social Networks as Measured by Facebook
26990.zh_title: COVID-19的地理传播与Facebook衡量的社交网络结构相关
26990.authors: Theresa Kuchler, Dominic Russel, Johannes Stroebel
26990.abstract: We use aggregated data from Facebook to show that COVID-19 was more likely to spread between regions with stronger social network connections. Areas with more social ties to two early COVID-19 “hotspots” (Westchester County, NY, in the U.S. and Lodi province in Italy) generally had more confirmed COVID-19 cases as of the end of March. These relationships hold after controlling for geographic distance to the hotspots as well as for the income and population densities of the regions. As the pandemic progressed in the U.S., a county's social proximity to recent COVID- 19 cases predicts future outbreaks over and above physical proximity.
