These results suggest data from online social networks can be useful to epidemiologists and others hoping to forecast the spread of communicable diseases such as COVID-19.
26990.zh_abstract: 我们利用Facebook的聚合数据表明，COVID-19更可能在社交网络联系更强的地区之间传播。与两个早期COVID-19“热点”地区（美国纽约州威斯特彻斯特县和意大利洛迪省）有更多社会联系的地区，截至3月底通常有更多确诊的COVID-19病例。这些关系在控制了与热点地区的地理距离以及地区的收入和人口密度后仍然成立。随着疫情在美国的发展，一个县与近期COVID-19病例的社会邻近性，在物理邻近性之外，预测了未来的疫情爆发。这些结果表明，来自在线社交网络的数据对流行病学家和其他希望预测COVID-19等传染病传播的人可能有用。
26990.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, EH, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：I0, R0

26989.title: How Are Small Businesses Adjusting to COVID-19? Early Evidence from a Survey
26989.zh_title: 小企业如何应对COVID-19？来自一项调查的早期证据
26989.authors: Alexander W. Bartik, Marianne Bertrand, Zoë B. Cullen, Edward L. Glaeser, Michael Luca, Christopher T. Stanton
26989.abstract: In addition to its impact on public health, COVID-19 has had a major impact on the economy. To shed light on how COVID-19 is affecting small businesses – and on the likely impact of the recent stimulus bill, we conducted a survey of more than 5,800 small businesses. Several main themes emerge from the results. First, mass layoffs and closures have already occurred. In our sample, 43 percent of businesses are temporarily closed, and businesses have – on average – reduced their employee counts by 40 percent relative to January. Second, consistent with previous literature, we find that many small businesses are financially fragile. For example, the median business has more than $\$10,000$ in monthly expenses and less than one month of cash on hand. Third, businesses have widely varying beliefs about the likely duration of COVID related disruptions. Fourth, the majority of businesses planned to seek funding through the CARES act. However, many anticipated problems with accessing the aid, such as bureaucratic hassles and difficulties establishing eligibility.
26989.zh_abstract: 除了对公共卫生的影响外，COVID-19还对经济产生了重大影响。为了阐明COVID-19如何影响小企业——以及近期刺激法案的可能影响，我们对超过5800家小企业进行了一项调查。结果中浮现出几个主要主题。首先，大规模裁员和关闭已经发生。在我们的样本中，43%的企业暂时关闭，企业平均员工人数相对于1月份减少了40%。其次，与以往文献一致，我们发现许多小企业财务脆弱。例如，中位数企业每月支出超过10,000美元，手头现金不足一个月。第三，企业对COVID相关中断可能持续的时间看法差异很大。第四，大多数企业计划通过CARES法案寻求资金。然而，许多人预见到获取援助方面的问题，例如官僚麻烦和确定资格方面的困难。
26989.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：E65, I12, L20

26988.title: The Evolving Consequences of OxyContin Reformulation on Drug Overdoses
26988.zh_title: 奥施康定配方改革对药物过量后果的演变影响
26988.abstract: Recent evidence suggests that the short-term transition of the opioid crisis from prescription opioids to heroin can be attributed to the reformulation of OxyContin, which substantially reduced access to abusable prescription opioids. In this paper, we find that over a longer time horizon, reformulation stimulated illicit drug markets to grow and evolve. We compare overdose trajectories in areas more exposed to reformulation, defined as states with higher rates of non-medical OxyContin use before reformulation, to less exposed areas. More exposed areas experienced disproportionate increases in fatal overdoses involving synthetic opioids (fentanyl) and non-opioid substances like cocaine, suggesting that these new epidemics are related to the same factors driving the rise in heroin deaths. Instead of just short-term substitution from prescription opioid to heroin overdoses, the transition to illicit markets spurred by reformulation led to growth in the overall overdose rate to unprecedented levels.
26988.zh_abstract: 近期证据表明，阿片类药物危机从处方阿片类药物向海洛因的短期转变可归因于奥施康定的配方改革，该改革大幅减少了可滥用的处方阿片类药物。在本文中，我们发现，在更长的时间范围内，配方改革刺激了非法药物市场的增长和演变。我们将配方改革暴露程度较高的地区（定义为改革前非医疗奥施康定使用率较高的州）与暴露程度较低的地区进行比较，比较其药物过量致死轨迹。暴露程度较高的地区涉及合成阿片类药物（芬太尼）和可卡因等非阿片类物质的致命过量事件不成比例地增加，这表明这些新的流行病与推动海洛因死亡人数上升的相同因素有关。配方改革引发的向非法市场的转变，并非仅仅是处方阿片类药物过量向海洛因过量的短期替代，而是导致总体药物过量率增长至前所未有的水平。

26987.title: COVID-19 and The Macroeconomic Effects of Costly Disasters
26987.zh_title: COVID-19与高成本灾难的宏观经济效应
26987.authors: Sydney C. Ludvigson, Sai Ma, Serena Ng
26987.abstract: The outbreak of COVID-19 has significantly disrupted the economy. This paper attempts to quantify the macroeconomic impact of costly and deadly disasters in recent US history, and to translate these estimates into an analysis of the likely impact of COVID-19. A costly disaster series is constructed over the sample 1980:1-2020:04 and the dynamic impact of a disaster shock on economic activity and on uncertainty is studied using a VAR. While past natural disasters are local in nature and come and go quickly, COVID-19 is a global, multi-period event. We therefore study the dynamic responses to a sequence of large disaster shocks. Even in a fairly conservative case where COVID-19 is a 5-month shock with its magnitude calibrated by the cost of March 2020 Coronavirus relief packages, the shock is forecast to lead to a cumulative loss in industrial production of 20% and in service sector employment of nearly 39% or 55 million jobs over the next 12 months. For each month that a shock of a given magnitude is prolonged from the base case, heightened macro uncertainty persists for another month.
26987.zh_abstract: COVID-19的爆发严重扰乱了经济。本文试图量化美国近代史上高成本且致命灾难的宏观经济影响，并将这些估计转化为对COVID-19可能影响的分析。我们构建了1980年1月至2020年4月期间的高成本灾难序列，并使用VAR模型研究灾难冲击对经济活动和经济不确定性的动态影响。虽然过去的自然灾害具有局部性且来去迅速，但COVID-19是一个全球性的、多时期的事件。因此，我们研究一系列大规模灾难冲击的动态响应。即使在相当保守的情况下，即COVID-19是一个为期5个月的冲击，其规模根据2020年3月冠状病毒救助计划的成本进行校准，该冲击预计将导致未来12个月内工业产值累计损失20%，服务业就业累计损失近39%或5500万个工作岗位。对于给定规模的冲击，每从基准情况延长一个月，宏观不确定性就会持续增加一个月。
26987.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, ME, PE, POL；JEL：E17, I0, I3

26986.title: The Wealth Decumulation Behavior of the Retired Elderly in Italy: The Importance of Bequest Motives and Precautionary Saving
26986.zh_title: 意大利退休老年人的财富消耗行为：遗赠动机和预防性储蓄的重要性
26986.abstract: In this paper, we analyze the wealth accumulation and saving behavior of the retired elderly in Italy using micro data from the “Survey of Italian Households’ Income and Wealth,” a panel survey of households conducted every two years by the Bank of Italy. We find that, on average, the retired elderly in Italy are decumulating their wealth (dissaving) but that their wealth decumulation rates are much slower than expected. Moreover, we also find that more than 40 percent of the retired elderly in Italy are continuing to accumulate wealth and that more than 80 percent are doing positive amounts of saving. Thus, the Wealth Decumulation Puzzle (the tendency of the retired elderly to decumulate their wealth more slowly than expected) appears to apply in the case of Italy, as it does in most other countries, before as well as after the Global Financial Crisis. Moreover, our regression analysis of the determinants of the wealth accumulation and saving behavior of the retired elderly in Italy suggests that the lower than expected wealth decumulation rates and dissaving of the retired elderly in Italy is due largely to intergenerational transfers (bequests and inter vivos transfers) and saving for precautionary purposes, especially the former.
26986.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用意大利银行每两年进行一次的家庭面板调查“意大利家庭收入与财富调查”的微观数据，分析了意大利退休老年人的财富积累和储蓄行为。我们发现，平均而言，意大利的退休老年人正在消耗财富（负储蓄），但其财富消耗率远低于预期。此外，我们还发现，超过40%的意大利退休老年人仍在继续积累财富，超过80%的人正在进行正储蓄。因此，财富消耗之谜（退休老年人消耗财富的速度慢于预期的趋势）似乎适用于意大利的情况，与全球金融危机前后的大多数其他国家一样。此外，我们对意大利退休老年人财富积累和储蓄行为决定因素的回归分析表明，意大利退休老年人财富消耗率和负储蓄低于预期，主要是由于代际转移（遗赠和生前转移）以及预防性储蓄，尤其是前者。
26986.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D12, D14, D15, D64, E21, J14

26985.title: Risk Sharing Externalities
26985.abstract: Financial crises typically arise because firms and financial institutions choose balance sheets that expose them to aggregate risk. We propose a theory to explain these risk exposures. We study a financial accelerator model where entrepreneurs can issue state-contingent claims to consumers. Even though entrepreneurs could use these contingent claims to hedge negative shocks, we show that they tend not to do so. This is because it is costly to buy insurance against these shocks as consumers are also harmed by them. This effect is self-reinforcing, as the fact that entrepreneurs are unhedged amplifies the negative effects of shocks on consumers’ incomes. We show that this feedback can be quantitatively important and lead to inefficiently high risk exposure for entrepreneurs.
26985.zh_abstract: 金融危机通常源于企业和金融机构选择使其资产负债表暴露于总体风险之下。我们提出一个理论来解释这些风险暴露。我们研究了一个金融加速器模型，其中企业家可以向消费者发行状态依存索取权。尽管企业家可以使用这些状态依存索取权来对冲负面冲击，但我们表明他们倾向于不这样做。这是因为购买针对这些冲击的保险成本高昂，因为消费者也受到这些冲击的损害。这种效应是自我强化的，因为企业家未对冲的事实放大了冲击对消费者收入的负面影响。我们表明，这种反馈在数量上可能很重要，并导致企业家面临低效率的高风险暴露。
26985.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E44, G01, G11

26984.title: Optimal Mitigation Policies in a Pandemic: Social Distancing and Working from Home
26984.zh_title: 大流行病中的最优缓解政策：社交距离与居家办公
26984.authors: Callum J. Jones, Thomas Philippon, Venky Venkateswaran
26984.abstract: We study the response of an economy to an unexpected epidemic. Households mitigate the spread of the disease by reducing consumption, reducing hours worked, and working from home. Working from home is subject to learning-by-doing and the capacity of the health care system is limited. A social planner worries about two externalities, an infection externality and a healthcare congestion externality. Private agents’ mitigation incentives are too weak and suﬀer from a fatalism bias with respect to future infection rates. The planner implements front-loaded mitigation policies and encourages working from home immediately. In our calibration, assuming a CFR of 1% and an initial infection rate of 0.1%, private mitigation reduces the cumulative death rate from 2.5% of the initially susceptible population to about 1.75%. The planner optimally imposes a drastic suppression policy and reduces the death rate to 0.15% at the cost of an initial drop in consumption of around 25%.
26984.zh_abstract: 我们研究经济对意外流行病的反应。家庭通过减少消费、减少工作时间和居家办公来缓解疾病的传播。居家办公受到干中学的影响，且医疗系统的容量有限。社会规划者关注两种外部性：感染外部性和医疗保健拥挤外部性。私人主体的缓解激励过弱，并且对未来感染率存在宿命论偏差。规划者实施前置的缓解政策，并鼓励立即居家办公。在我们的校准中，假设病死率为1%，初始感染率为0.1%，私人缓解措施将初始易感人群的累计死亡率从2.5%降低到约1.75%。规划者最优地实施严厉的抑制政策，将死亡率降低到0.15%，代价是消费初始下降约25%。

26983.title: COVID-Induced Economic Uncertainty
26983.authors: Scott R. Baker, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Stephen J. Terry
26983.abstract: Assessing the economic impact of the COVID-19 pandemic is essential for policymakers, but challenging because the crisis has unfolded with extreme speed. We identify three indicators – stock market volatility, newspaper-based economic uncertainty, and subjective uncertainty in business expectation surveys – that provide real-time forward-looking uncertainty measures. We use these indicators to document and quantify the enormous increase in economic uncertainty in the past several weeks. We also illustrate how these forward-looking measures can be used to assess the macroeconomic impact of the COVID-19 crisis. Specifically, we feed COVID-induced first-moment and uncertainty shocks into an estimated model of disaster effects developed by Baker, Bloom and Terry (2020). Our illustrative exercise implies a year-on-year contraction in U.S. real GDP of nearly 11 percent as of 2020 Q4, with a 90 percent confidence interval extending to a nearly 20 percent contraction. The exercise says that about half of the forecasted output contraction reflects a negative effect of COVID-induced uncertainty.
26983.zh_abstract: 评估COVID-19大流行病的经济影响对政策制定者至关重要，但由于危机以极快的速度展开，这具有挑战性。我们确定了三个指标——股市波动率、基于报纸的经济不确定性以及商业预期调查中的主观不确定性——它们提供了实时的前瞻性不确定性度量。我们使用这些指标来记录和量化过去几周经济不确定性的巨大增长。我们还说明了如何利用这些前瞻性指标来评估COVID-19危机的宏观经济影响。具体来说，我们将COVID引发的第一矩冲击和不确定性冲击输入到Baker、Bloom和Terry（2020）开发的灾难效应估计模型中。我们的说明性练习表明，截至2020年第四季度，美国实际GDP同比收缩近11%，90%置信区间延伸至近20%的收缩。该练习表明，预测产出收缩中约一半反映了COVID引发的不确定性的负面影响。

26982.title: Social Distancing, Internet Access and Inequality
26982.zh_title: 社交距离、互联网接入与不平等
26982.abstract: This paper measures the role of the diffusion of high-speed Internet on an individual's ability to self-isolate during a global pandemic. We use data that tracks 20 million mobile devices and their movements across physical locations, and whether the mobile devices leave their homes that day. We show that while income is correlated with differences in the ability to stay at home, the unequal diffusion of high-speed Internet in homes across regions drives much of this observed income effect. We examine compliance with state-level directives to avoid leaving your home. Devices in regions with either high-income or high-speed Internet are less likely to leave their homes after such a directive. However, the combination of having both high income and high-speed Internet appears to be the biggest driver of propensity to stay at home. Our results suggest that the digital divide---or the fact that income and home Internet access are correlated---appears to explain much inequality we observe in people's ability to self-isolate.
26982.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了高速互联网普及在全球大流行期间对个人自我隔离能力的作用。我们使用了追踪2000万移动设备及其在物理位置间移动的数据，以及移动设备当天是否离开家。我们表明，虽然收入与居家能力的差异相关，但各地区家庭高速互联网普及的不平等在很大程度上驱动了这种观察到的收入效应。我们考察了对州级避免离家指令的遵守情况。在收入高或高速互联网普及的地区，设备在收到此类指令后离开家的可能性较小。然而，同时拥有高收入和高速互联网似乎是居家倾向的最大驱动因素。我们的结果表明，数字鸿沟——即收入与家庭互联网接入相关的事实——似乎解释了我们在人们自我隔离能力中观察到的许多不平等。

26981.title: A Simple Planning Problem for COVID-19 Lockdown
26981.zh_title: COVID-19封锁的一个简单规划问题
26981.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, David Argente, Francesco Lippi
26981.abstract: We study the optimal lockdown policy for a planner who wants to control the fatalities of a pandemic while minimizing the output costs of the lockdown. We use the SIR epidemiology model and a linear economy to formalize the planner's dynamic control problem. The optimal policy depends on the fraction of infected and susceptible in the population. We parametrize the model using data on the COVID19 pandemic and the economic breadth of the lockdown. The quantitative analysis identifies the features that shape the intensity and duration of the optimal lockdown policy. Our baseline parametrization is conditional on a 1% of infected agents at the outbreak, no cure for the disease, and the possibility of testing. The optimal policy prescribes a severe lockdown beginning two weeks after the outbreak, covers 60% of the population after a month, and is gradually withdrawn covering 20% of the population after 3 months. The intensity of the lockdown depends on the gradient of the fatality rate as a function of the infected, and on the assumed value of a statistical life. The absence of testing increases the economic costs of the lockdown, and shortens the duration of the optimal lockdown which ends more abruptly. Welfare under the optimal policy with testing is higher, equivalent to a one-time payment of 2% of GDP.
26981.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个规划者的最优封锁政策，该规划者希望在控制大流行病致死率的同时，最小化封锁的产出成本。我们使用SIR流行病学模型和线性经济来形式化规划者的动态控制问题。最优政策取决于人口中感染者和易感者的比例。我们使用COVID-19大流行病的数据和封锁的经济广度来参数化模型。定量分析识别了塑造最优封锁政策强度和持续时间的特征。我们的基线参数化基于爆发时1%的感染者、无疾病治愈方法以及检测的可能性。最优政策规定在爆发两周后开始严厉封锁，一个月后覆盖60%的人口，并在三个月后逐步退出，覆盖20%的人口。封锁的强度取决于作为感染者函数的致死率梯度，以及统计生命价值的假设。缺乏检测会增加封锁的经济成本，并缩短最优封锁的持续时间，使其更突然地结束。有检测的最优政策下的福利更高，相当于一次性支付GDP的2%。

26980.title: Rising Burdens of Proofs and The Grand Bargain of Workers’ Compensation Laws
26980.zh_title: 举证责任上升与工伤赔偿法的“大妥协”
26980.abstract: Nearly every state has amended workers’ compensation laws in the last two decades and the national averages of cash and medical benefits paid per covered worker have declined. As a result, writers have suggested that the states might be cutting back on workers’ compensation benefits. We show that measures of the statutory benefits have been rising over time, a trend that work against the declining trend in average payouts per covered worker. A decline in accident rates at the national level has contributed to the decline in payouts. We then investigate the impact of specific state laws related to burdens of proof and limits on medical coverage after developing an annual panel data set for all states between 1997 and 2016. The results show that state laws that ban liberal construction of the rules and apportion benefits based on pre-existing conditions contribute to sharp declines in the states where they are enacted.
26980.zh_abstract: 在过去二十年中，几乎所有州都修订了工伤赔偿法，而每位受保工人获得的现金和医疗福利的全国平均水平却有所下降。因此，有作者认为各州可能正在削减工伤赔偿福利。我们表明，法定福利的衡量指标随时间推移而上升，这一趋势与每位受保工人平均赔付额的下降趋势相反。全国范围内事故率的下降对赔付额的下降有所贡献。随后，在编制了1997年至2016年所有州的年度面板数据后，我们研究了与举证责任和医疗覆盖限制相关的特定州法律的影响。结果表明，禁止对规则进行自由解释以及根据已有状况分配福利的州法律，在其颁布的州导致了赔付额的急剧下降。

26979.title: Every Day is Earth Day: Evidence on the Long-term Impact of Environmental Activism
26979.zh_title: 每天都是地球日：环境行动主义长期影响的证据
26979.authors: Daniel M. Hungerman, Vivek S. Moorthy
26979.abstract: We explore the importance of activism in the context of Earth Day. We use variation in weather to study the long-term effects of the original Earth Day on attitudes, environmental outcomes, and children's health. Unusually bad weather in a community on April 22, 1970, is associated 10 to 20 years later with weaker support for the environment, particularly among those who were school-aged in 1970. Bad weather on Earth Day is also associated with higher levels of carbon monoxide in the air and greater risk of congenital abnormalities in infants born in the following decades. These results indicate a long-lasting and localized effect of Earth Day, and show that there can be benefits to voluntary activity that would be impossible to identify until years after the volunteering occurs.
26979.zh_abstract: 我们在地球日的背景下探讨了行动主义的重要性。我们利用天气变化来研究最初的地球日对态度、环境结果和儿童健康的长期影响。1970年4月22日某个社区异常恶劣的天气，与10到20年后对环境支持度的减弱相关，尤其是在1970年处于学龄的人群中。地球日的恶劣天气还与空气中一氧化碳水平升高以及随后几十年出生的婴儿先天性异常风险增加相关。这些结果表明地球日具有持久且局部的影响，并表明自愿活动可能带来在活动发生多年后才能识别的益处。
26979.meta: Programs：CH, EEE, PE；JEL：H4, I1, Q10, Z10

26978.title: Effects of the Affordable Care Act Dependent Coverage Mandate on Health Insurance Coverage for Individuals in Same-Sex Couples
26978.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》受抚养人覆盖强制条款对同性伴侣中个人健康保险覆盖的影响
26978.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Gilbert Gonzales Jr., Tara McKay, Dario Sansone
26978.abstract: A large body of research documents that the 2010 dependent coverage mandate of the Affordable Care Act was responsible for significantly increasing health insurance coverage among young adults. No prior research has examined whether sexual minority young adults also benefitted from the dependent coverage mandate, despite previous studies showing lower health insurance coverage among sexual minorities and the fact that their higher likelihood of strained relationships with their parents might predict a lower ability to use parental coverage. Our estimates from the American Community Surveys using difference-in-differences and event study models show that men in same-sex couples age 21-25 were significantly more likely to have any health insurance after 2010 compared to the associated change for slightly older 27 to 31-year-old men in same-sex couples. This increase is concentrated among employer-sponsored insurance, and it is robust to permutations of time periods and age groups. Effects for women in same-sex couples and men in different-sex couples are smaller than the associated effects for men in same-sex couples. These findings confirm the broad effects of expanded dependent coverage and suggest that eliminating the federal dependent mandate could reduce health insurance coverage among young adult sexual minorities in same-sex couples.
26978.zh_abstract: 大量研究文献表明，2010年《平价医疗法案》的受抚养人覆盖强制条款显著提高了年轻人的健康保险覆盖率。尽管先前的研究显示性少数群体的健康保险覆盖率较低，且他们与父母关系紧张的可能性更高，这可能预示着他们利用父母保险的能力较低，但此前没有研究考察性少数年轻人是否也从受抚养人覆盖强制条款中受益。我们使用美国社区调查的数据，通过双重差分和事件研究模型进行的估计显示，与年龄稍大的27至31岁同性伴侣男性相比，21至25岁同性伴侣男性在2010年后拥有任何健康保险的可能性显著增加。这一增长主要集中在雇主提供的保险中，并且对时间段和年龄组的排列具有稳健性。对同性伴侣女性和异性伴侣男性的影响小于对同性伴侣男性的相应影响。这些发现证实了扩大受抚养人覆盖的广泛影响，并表明取消联邦受抚养人强制条款可能会降低同性伴侣中年轻性少数群体的健康保险覆盖率。

26977.title: News that Takes Your Breath Away: Risk Perceptions During an Outbreak of Vaping-related Lung Injuries
26977.zh_title: 令人窒息的新闻：电子烟相关肺损伤爆发期间的风险认知
26977.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Daniel L. Dench, Donald S. Kenkel, Alan D. Mathios, Hua Wang
26977.abstract: We study the impact of new information on people’s perceptions of the risks of e-cigarettes. In September 2019 the U.S. experienced an outbreak of e-cigarette, or vaping, associated lung injuries (EVALI). The EVALI outbreak created an information shock, which was followed by additional new information in a later CDC recommendation. We use data on consumer risk perceptions from two sets of surveys conducted before (using HINTS survey data) and during the EVALI outbreak (using Google Survey data). The empirical model examines changes in risk perceptions during the early crisis period when the CDC was warning consumers that they should avoid all vaping products and during a later period when the message was refined and focused on a much narrower set of illegal vaping products that contain THC (the main psychoactive compound in marijuana). Our econometric results suggest that the immediate impact of the first information shock was to increase the fraction of respondents who perceived e-cigarettes as more harmful than smoking by about 16 percentage points. As the outbreak subsided and the CDC recommendation changed to emphasize the role of THC e-cigarette products, e-cigarette risk perceptions were partially revised downwards. Additional econometric results show that different demographic groups reacted somewhat differently to the information shock. In particular, we find that groups who had higher risk perceptions showed a weaker response to the first information shock but were more likely to later revise their risk perceptions downwards. We conclude the paper by discussing the public policy issues that stem from having risk perceptions of e-cigarettes relative to combustible cigarettes remain at these elevated levels where a substantial portion of consumers believe that e-cigarettes are more harmful than cigarettes.
26977.zh_abstract: 我们研究新信息对人们对电子烟风险认知的影响。2019年9月，美国爆发了电子烟或 vaping 相关肺损伤（EVALI）。EVALI 爆发造成了一次信息冲击，随后美国疾病控制与预防中心（CDC）的一项建议又带来了额外的新信息。我们使用了在 EVALI 爆发前（使用 HINTS 调查数据）和爆发期间（使用 Google 调查数据）进行的两组调查中关于消费者风险认知的数据。实证模型考察了早期危机期间（当时 CDC 警告消费者应避免所有 vaping 产品）以及后期（信息被细化并聚焦于范围更窄的含有 THC（大麻中的主要精神活性化合物）的非法 vaping 产品）风险认知的变化。我们的计量经济学结果表明，第一次信息冲击的直接影响是，认为电子烟比吸烟更有害的受访者比例增加了约16个百分点。随着疫情消退以及 CDC 建议转向强调 THC 电子烟产品的作用，电子烟的风险认知被部分下调。额外的计量经济学结果表明，不同人口群体对信息冲击的反应略有不同。特别是，我们发现风险认知较高的群体对第一次信息冲击的反应较弱，但更有可能在之后下调其风险认知。在论文结尾，我们讨论了由于电子烟相对于可燃香烟的风险认知持续处于较高水平（相当一部分消费者认为电子烟比香烟更有害）而产生的公共政策问题。
26977.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, PE；JEL：D8, H0, I1, K0

26976.title: The Impact of Benefit Generosity on Workers’ Compensation Claims: Evidence and Implications
26976.zh_title: 福利慷慨程度对工伤赔偿索赔的影响：证据与启示
26976.abstract: Leveraging unique administrative data and a sharp increase in benefit generosity in a difference-indifferences research design, we estimate the impact of workers’ compensation wage replacement benefits on individual behavior and program costs. We find that increased benefit generosity leads to longer income benefit durations and increased medical spending. Responses along these two margins are equally important drivers of increased program costs, collectively increasing program costs 1.4 times the mechanical increase in costs. Using these estimates and an estimate of the consumption drop among injured workers, our welfare calibrations suggest that a marginal increase in benefit generosity would not improve welfare.
26976.zh_abstract: 利用独特的行政数据和双重差分研究设计中福利慷慨程度的急剧增加，我们估计了工伤赔偿工资替代福利对个人行为和项目成本的影响。我们发现，福利慷慨程度的提高导致收入福利持续时间延长和医疗支出增加。这两个方面的反应是项目成本增加同等重要的驱动因素，共同使项目成本增加了机械性成本增长的1.4倍。利用这些估计以及对受伤工人消费下降的估计，我们的福利校准表明，福利慷慨程度的边际增加不会改善福利。

26975.title: Relief Rally: Senators As Feckless As the Rest of Us at Stock Picking
26975.zh_title: 救济性反弹：参议员在选股方面和我们一样无能
26975.authors: William Belmont, Bruce Sacerdote, Ranjan Sehgal, Ian Van Hoek
26975.abstract: We examine the stock trading behavior and returns of U.S. senators from 2012-March 2020. Stocks purchased by senators on average slightly underperform stocks in the same industry and size (market cap) categories by 11 basis points, 28 basis points and 17 basis points at the 1, 3, and 6-month time horizons. Stocks sold by senators underperform slightly for the first three months and then outperform slightly (a statistically insignificant 14 basis points) at the one year mark. We find no evidence that senators have industry specific stock picking ability related to their committee assignments. Neither Republican nor Democratic senators are skilled at picking stocks to buy, while stocks sold by Republican senators underperform by 50 basis points over three months. Stocks sold following the January 24th COVID-19 briefing do underperform the market by a statistically significant 9 percent while stocks purchased during this period underperform by 3 percent. Our findings contrast somewhat with recent news reports and studies of pre-STOCK Act (2012) returns, though are consistent with Eggers and Hainmueller (2013).
26975.zh_abstract: 我们考察了2012年至2020年3月期间美国参议员的股票交易行为和回报。参议员购买的股票在1个月、3个月和6个月的时间范围内，平均而言，其表现略逊于同行业和同规模（市值）类别的股票，分别低11个基点、28个基点和17个基点。参议员卖出的股票在前三个月表现略差，然后在一年期时表现略好（统计上不显著的14个基点）。我们没有发现证据表明参议员具有与其委员会职务相关的特定行业选股能力。共和党和民主党参议员在购买股票方面都不擅长，而共和党参议员卖出的股票在三个月内表现落后50个基点。在1月24日的新冠疫情简报会后卖出的股票，其表现确实落后市场9个百分点（统计上显著），而在此期间购买的股票表现落后3个百分点。我们的发现与近期的新闻报道和《股票法案》（2012年）之前回报率的研究有些不同，但与 Eggers 和 Hainmueller（2013）的研究一致。

26974.title: The Implications of Heterogeneity and Inequality for Asset Pricing
26974.zh_title: 异质性与不平等对资产定价的影响
26974.abstract: Does heterogeneity matter for asset pricing and in particular for risk premiums? Starting with an irrelevance result, I classify the literature into two groups of papers taking different routes to link investor heterogeneity and risk premiums. The first group contains models of investors who differ in terms of their preferences, beliefs, or access to markets. Despite their differences, these models have similar implications, and can be analyzed in a unified way. The second group of papers consists of models where investors experience uninsurable income shocks. The goal of this survey is to provide one unified framework to better understand this large literature, and especially to reconcile several of the seemingly inconsistent results found in some seminal papers.
26974.zh_abstract: 异质性对资产定价，特别是对风险溢价是否重要？从一个无关性结果出发，我将文献分为两组，它们采取不同的路径来连接投资者异质性和风险溢价。第一组包含投资者在偏好、信念或市场准入方面存在差异的模型。尽管存在差异，这些模型具有相似的含义，并且可以以统一的方式进行分析。第二组论文包含投资者经历不可保险收入冲击的模型。本综述的目标是提供一个统一的框架，以更好地理解这一庞大的文献，特别是调和一些开创性论文中发现的看似不一致的结果。

26973.title: Should Germany Have Built a New Wall? Macroeconomic Lessons from the 2015-18 Refugee Wave
26973.zh_title: 德国本应修建新墙吗？2015-2018年难民潮的宏观经济学教训
26973.authors: Christopher Busch, Dirk Krueger, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova, Zainab Iftikhar
26973.abstract: In 2015-2016 Germany experienced a wave of predominantly low-skilled refugee immigration. We evaluate its macroeconomic and distributional effects using a quantitative overlapping generations model calibrated using German micro data to replicate education and productivity differentials between foreign born and native workers. Workers are modelled as imperfect substitutes in aggregate production leading to endogenous wage differentials. We simulate the dynamic effects of this refugee wave, with specific focus on the welfare impact on low skilled natives. Our results indicate that the small losses this group suffers can be compensated by welfare gains of other parts of the native population.
26973.zh_abstract: 在2015-2016年，德国经历了一波以低技能为主的难民移民潮。我们使用一个量化的世代交叠模型来评估其宏观经济学和分配效应，该模型使用德国微观数据进行校准，以复制外国出生工人与本地工人之间的教育和生产率差异。工人在总生产中建模为不完全替代品，导致内生工资差异。我们模拟了这波难民潮的动态效应，特别关注对低技能本地人的福利影响。我们的结果表明，该群体遭受的小幅损失可以被本地人口其他部分的福利收益所补偿。
26973.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E20, F22, H55

26972.title: Beyond Cobb-Douglas: Flexibly Estimating Matching Functions with Unobserved Matching Efficiency
26972.zh_title: 超越柯布-道格拉斯：灵活估计具有未观测匹配效率的匹配函数
26972.abstract: Exploiting results from the literature on non-parametric identification, we make three methodological contributions to the empirical literature estimating the matching function, commonly used to map unemployment and vacancies into hires. First, we show how to non-parametrically identify the matching function. Second, we estimate the matching function allowing for unobserved matching efficacy, without imposing the usual independence assumption between matching efficiency and search on either side of the labor market. Third, we allow for multiple types of jobseekers and consider an “augmented” Beveridge curve that includes them. Our estimated elasticity of hires with respect to vacancies is procyclical and varies between 0.15 and 0.3. This is substantially lower than common estimates suggesting that a significant bias stems from the commonly-used independence assumption. Moreover, variation in match efficiency accounts for much of the decline in hires during the Great Recession.
26972.zh_abstract: 利用非参数识别文献的结果，我们对估计匹配函数的实证文献做出了三项方法论贡献，该函数通常用于将失业和职位空缺映射为招聘人数。首先，我们展示了如何非参数地识别匹配函数。其次，我们在允许未观测匹配效率的情况下估计匹配函数，而不强加通常的假设，即匹配效率与劳动力市场双方的搜寻行为相互独立。第三，我们允许多种类型的求职者，并考虑一条包含这些求职者的“扩展”贝弗里奇曲线。我们估计的招聘人数相对于职位空缺的弹性是顺周期的，并在0.15到0.3之间变化。这远低于常见的估计值，表明常用的独立性假设导致了显著的偏差。此外，匹配效率的变化在很大程度上解释了大衰退期间招聘人数的下降。

26971.title: Firm-Level Exposure to Epidemic Diseases: COVID-19, SARS, and H1N1
26971.zh_title: 企业层面的流行病暴露：COVID-19、SARS和H1N1
26971.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Stephan Hollander, Laurence van Lent, Markus Schwedeler, Ahmed Tahoun
26971.abstract: We construct text-based measures of the primary concerns listed firms associated with the spread of COVID-19 and other epidemic diseases. We identify which firms perceive to lose or gain from a given epidemic and textually decompose the epidemic's effect on the firm's demand and supply. We find that the effects of COVID-19 manifest as a simultaneous shock to demand and supply, with both shocks affecting firms' market valuations in equal measure on average. By contrast, demand-related impacts appear more important in accounting for the observed collapse in firm-level investment during the COVID-19 crisis.
26971.zh_abstract: 我们构建了基于文本的指标，用以衡量上市公司与COVID-19及其他流行病传播相关的主要担忧。我们识别出哪些企业认为在特定流行病中会受损或受益，并通过文本分解流行病对企业需求和供给的影响。我们发现，COVID-19的影响表现为对需求和供给的同时冲击，平均而言，这两种冲击对企业市场估值的影响程度相当。相比之下，与需求相关的影响在解释COVID-19危机期间观察到的企业投资崩溃方面显得更为重要。
26971.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, EH, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E0, E6, F0, G12, I0

26969.title: Understanding “Wage Theft”: Evasion and Avoidance Responses to Minimum Wage Increases
26969.zh_title: 理解“工资盗窃”：对最低工资上涨的规避和逃避反应
26969.abstract: A holistic assessment of the labor market effects of minimum wage regulation requires understanding employer compliance. We investigate how minimum wage increases and the strength of enforcement regimes affect the prevalence of subminimum wage payment. Using the Current Population Survey (CPS), we find strong evidence that higher minimum wages lead to a greater prevalence of subminimum wage payment. We estimate that increases in measured underpayment following minimum wage increases average between 14 and 22 percent of realized wage gains. Furthermore, we provide evidence that these estimates are unlikely to be driven by measurement error in the CPS’s wage data, which are self-reported. Taken together, we interpret these findings as evidence that minimum wage noncompliance is an important reality in the low-wage labor market. We find some evidence that enforcement regimes mediate both baseline rates of subminimum wage payment and the response of subminimum wage payment to increases in minimum wages.
26969.zh_abstract: 对最低工资监管的劳动力市场效应进行全面评估需要理解雇主的合规情况。我们研究了最低工资上涨和执法力度如何影响低于最低工资支付的发生率。利用当前人口调查（CPS），我们发现有强有力的证据表明，更高的最低工资导致低于最低工资支付的发生率更高。我们估计，在最低工资上涨后，测得的少付工资的增加平均占已实现工资增长的14%到22%。此外，我们提供的证据表明，这些估计不太可能由CPS工资数据（自我报告）中的测量误差驱动。综合来看，我们将这些发现解释为最低工资违规是低工资劳动力市场一个重要现实的证据。我们发现一些证据表明，执法力度既调节了低于最低工资支付的基准发生率，也调节了低于最低工资支付对最低工资上涨的反应。

26968.title: Do Investors Care about Carbon Risk?
26968.abstract: This paper explores whether carbon emissions affect the cross-section of U.S. stock returns. We find that stocks of firms with higher total CO2 emissions (and changes in emissions) earn higher returns, after controlling for size, book-to-market, momentum, and other factors that predict returns. We cannot explain this carbon premium through differences in unexpected profitability or other known risk factors. We also find that institutional investors implement exclusionary screening based on direct emission intensity in a few salient industries. Overall, our results are consistent with an interpretation that investors are already demanding compensation for their exposure to carbon emission risk.
26968.zh_abstract: 本文探讨了碳排放是否影响美国股票回报的横截面。我们发现，在控制了规模、账面市值比、动量和其他预测回报的因素后，总二氧化碳排放量（以及排放变化）较高的公司股票获得更高的回报。我们无法通过意外盈利能力或其他已知风险因素的差异来解释这种碳溢价。我们还发现，机构投资者在少数几个显著行业中基于直接排放强度实施排除性筛选。总体而言，我们的结果与投资者已经要求对其碳排放风险暴露进行补偿的解释一致。

26967.title: Diminishing Marginal Returns to Computer-Assisted Learning
26967.zh_title: 计算机辅助学习的边际收益递减
26967.authors: Eric Bettinger, Robert W. Fairlie, Anastasia Kapuza, Elena Kardanova, Prashant Loyalka, Andrey Zakharov
26967.abstract: The previous expansion of EdTech as a substitute for traditional learning around the world, the recent full-scale substitution due to COVID-19, and potential future shifts to blended approaches suggest that it is imperative to understand input substitutability between in-person and online learning. We explore input substitutability in education by employing a novel randomized controlled trial that varies dosage of computer-assisted learning (CAL) as a substitute for traditional learning through homework. Moving from zero to a low level of CAL, we find positive substitutability of CAL for traditional learning. Moving from a lower to a higher level of CAL, substitutability changes and is either neutral or even negative. The estimates suggest that a blended approach of CAL and traditional learning is optimal. The findings have direct implications for the rapidly expanding use of educational technology worldwide prior to, during and after the pandemic.
26967.zh_abstract: 此前教育科技作为传统学习替代品在全球的扩张、近期因COVID-19导致的全面替代，以及未来可能向混合方法的转变，都表明理解面对面学习和在线学习之间的投入替代性至关重要。我们通过一项新颖的随机对照试验来探索教育中的投入替代性，该试验通过家庭作业改变计算机辅助学习（CAL）作为传统学习替代品的剂量。从零CAL移动到低水平CAL，我们发现CAL对传统学习具有正向替代性。从较低水平CAL移动到较高水平CAL，替代性发生变化，变为中性甚至负向。估计表明，CAL和传统学习的混合方法是最优的。这些发现对全球在大流行之前、期间和之后迅速扩大的教育技术使用具有直接启示。
26967.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：F63, I25

26966.title: Presence and Persistence of Poverty in U.S. Tax Data
26966.zh_title: 美国税收数据中贫困的存在与持续性
26966.authors: Jeff Larrimore, Jacob Mortenson, David Splinter
26966.abstract: This paper presents new estimates of the level and persistence of poverty among U.S. households since the Great Recession. We build annual household data files using U.S. income tax filings between 2007 and 2018. These data allow us to track individuals over time and measure how tax policies affect poverty trends. Using an after-tax household income measure, we estimate that while roughly 1 in 10 people are in poverty in any given year, over 4 in 10 people spent at least one year in poverty between 2007 and 2018. This implies substantial mobility in and out of poverty—for example, 41 percent of those in poverty in 2007 were out of poverty in the following year. Others spend multiple years in poverty or escape poverty only to fall back into it. Of those in poverty in 2007, one-third were in poverty for at least half of the years through 2018.
26966.zh_abstract: 本文提供了自大衰退以来美国家庭贫困水平和持续性的新估计。我们利用2007年至2018年间美国所得税申报表构建了年度家庭数据文件。这些数据使我们能够随时间追踪个人，并衡量税收政策如何影响贫困趋势。使用税后家庭收入指标，我们估计，虽然任何给定年份大约有十分之一的人处于贫困状态，但在2007年至2018年间，超过十分之四的人至少有一年处于贫困状态。这意味着贫困状态存在显著的流动性——例如，2007年贫困人口中有41%在次年摆脱了贫困。其他人则多年处于贫困状态，或者摆脱贫困后又重新陷入贫困。在2007年贫困人口中，三分之一的人在截至2018年的一半以上年份中处于贫困状态。

26965.title: How Deadly Is COVID-19? Understanding The Difficulties With Estimation Of Its Fatality Rate
26965.zh_title: COVID-19有多致命？理解其病死率估计的困难
26965.abstract: To understand how best to combat COVID-19, we must understand how deadly is the disease. There is a substantial debate in the epidemiological lit- erature as to whether the fatality rate is 1% or 0.1% or somewhere in between. In this note, I use an SIR model to examine why it is difficult to estimate the fatality rate from the disease and how long we might have to wait to resolve this question absent a large-scale randomized testing program. I focus on un- certainty over the joint distribution of the fatality rate and the initial number of active cases at the start of the epidemic around January 15, 2020. I show how the model with a high initial number of active cases and a low fatality rate gives the same predictions for the evolution of the number of deaths in the early stages of the pandemic as the same model with a low initial number of active cases and a high fatality rate. The problem of distinguishing these two parameterizations of the model becomes more severe in the presence of effective mitigation measures. As discussed by many, this uncertainty could be resolved now with large-scale randomized testing.
26965.zh_abstract: 为了理解如何最好地抗击COVID-19，我们必须了解这种疾病有多致命。流行病学文献中对于病死率是1%、0.1%还是介于两者之间存在重大争论。在本说明中，我使用SIR模型来检验为什么难以估计该疾病的病死率，以及在没有大规模随机检测计划的情况下，我们需要等待多久才能解决这个问题。我重点关注病死率和2020年1月15日左右疫情开始时活跃病例初始数量的联合分布的不确定性。我展示了，在疫情早期阶段，具有高初始活跃病例数和低病死率的模型与具有低初始活跃病例数和高病死率的模型，对死亡人数演变的预测相同。在存在有效缓解措施的情况下，区分这两种模型参数化的问题变得更加严重。正如许多人讨论的那样，这种不确定性现在可以通过大规模随机检测来解决。

26964.title: Technological Innovation and Labor Income Risk
26964.zh_title: 技术创新与劳动收入风险
26964.authors: Leonid Kogan, Dimitris Papanikolaou, Lawrence D. W. Schmidt, Jae Song
26964.abstract: Using administrative data from the United States, we document novel stylized facts regarding technological innovation and the riskiness of labor income. Higher rates of industry innovation are associated with significant increases in labor earnings for top workers. Decomposing this result, we find that own firm innovation is associated with a modest increase in the mean, but also variance, of worker earnings growth. Innovation by competing firms is related to lower, and more negatively skewed, future earnings. We construct a structural model featuring creative destruction and displacement of human capital that replicates these patterns. In the model, higher rates of innovation by competing firms increases the likelihood that both the worker and the incumbent producer are displaced. By contrast, a higher rate of innovation by the worker's own firm increases profits, but is a mixed blessing for workers, as it increases odds that the skilled worker is no longer a good match to the new technology. Estimating the parameters of the model using indirect inference, we find significant welfare losses and hedging demand against innovation shocks. Consistent with our model, we find that these left tail effects are more pronounced for process improvements, novel innovations, and are concentrated in movers rather than continuing workers.
26964.zh_abstract: 利用美国行政数据，我们记录了关于技术创新与劳动收入风险性的新颖典型事实。较高的行业创新率与顶尖工人的劳动收入显著增加相关。分解这一结果，我们发现，自身企业的创新与工人收入增长的均值适度增加相关，但也与方差增大相关。竞争对手企业的创新则与未来收入降低且更负偏态相关。我们构建了一个包含创造性破坏和人力资本替代的结构模型，该模型复制了这些模式。在该模型中，竞争对手企业更高的创新率增加了工人和现有生产者被替代的可能性。相比之下，工人自身企业更高的创新率增加了利润，但对工人而言是福祸相依，因为它增加了熟练工人不再适应新技术的可能性。通过间接推断法估计模型参数，我们发现显著的福利损失和对创新冲击的对冲需求。与我们的模型一致，我们发现这些左尾效应在流程改进、新颖创新中更为显著，并且集中在流动工人而非继续留任的工人身上。
26964.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E24, G10, G12

26963.title: Reversing Reserves
26963.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Alex Rees-Jones, Tayfun Sönmez
26963.abstract: Affirmative action policies are often implemented through reserve systems. In this study, we demonstrate that reserve systems face widespread misunderstanding by the public. This misunderstanding can lead individuals to support policies that ineffectively pursue their interests. To establish these claims, we present 1,013 participants in the Understanding America Study with choices between pairs of reserve systems. Participants are members of the group receiving affirmative action and are financially incentivized to choose the system that maximizes their chance of admission. Using this data, we apply a novel approach to identifying the rate of uptake of different decision rules used by participants. We find that participants rarely use a fully optimal decision rule. In contrast, we find that many choices—40% in our primary estimates—are rationalized by a nearly correct decision rule, with errors driven solely by failing to appreciate the importance of processing order. Failing to account for processing order causes individuals to fail to distinguish between two policies that achieve different degrees of affirmative action: policies that provide non-binding minimum guarantees of the number of spaces allocated and policies that provide spaces over-and-above what would be allocated absent a reserve. Confusion about the importance of processing order helps to explain otherwise surprising decisions made in field applications of reserve systems. We discuss implications for managers and policy makers who are trying to implement reserve systems and who are accountable to the public.
26963.zh_abstract: 平权行动政策通常通过配额制度实施。在本研究中，我们证明配额制度面临公众的广泛误解。这种误解可能导致个人支持那些无法有效追求其利益的政策。为确立这些论断，我们向“理解美国研究”中的1013名参与者展示了多对配额制度之间的选择。参与者是接受平权行动的群体成员，并受到经济激励，以选择最大化其录取机会的制度。利用这些数据，我们应用一种新颖的方法来识别参与者使用的不同决策规则的采纳率。我们发现参与者很少使用完全最优的决策规则。相比之下，我们发现许多选择——在我们的主要估计中占40%——可以通过一个近乎正确的决策规则来合理化，其错误仅源于未能认识到处理顺序的重要性。未能考虑处理顺序导致个人无法区分两种实现不同程度平权行动的政策：提供非约束性最低名额保障的政策，以及提供超出无配额时分配名额的政策。对处理顺序重要性的混淆有助于解释在配额制度实地应用中出现的令人惊讶的决策。我们讨论了对试图实施配额制度并对公众负责的管理者和政策制定者的启示。

26962.title: Disasters Everywhere: The Costs of Business Cycles Reconsidered
26962.zh_title: 无处不在的灾难：重新审视经济周期的成本
26962.authors: Òscar Jordà, Moritz Schularick, Alan M. Taylor
26962.abstract: Business cycles are costlier and stabilization policies could be more beneficial than widely thought. This paper introduces a new test to show that all business cycles are asymmetric and resemble “mini-disasters.” By this we mean that growth is pervasively fat-tailed and non-Gaussian. Using long-run historical data, we show empirically that this is true for advanced economies since 1870. Focusing on peacetime eras, we develop a tractable local projection framework to estimate consumption growth paths for normal and financial-crisis recessions. Introducing random coefficient local projections (RCLP) we get an easy and transparent mapping from the estimates to a calibrated simulation model with disasters of variable severity. Simulations show that substantial welfare costs arise not just from the large rare disasters, but also from the smaller but more frequent mini-disasters in every cycle. On average, and in post-WW2 data, even with low risk aversion, households would sacrifice about 15 percent of consumption to avoid such cyclical fluctuations.
26962.zh_abstract: 经济周期的成本比普遍认为的更高，稳定政策可能比广泛认为的更有益。本文引入一项新检验，表明所有经济周期都是非对称的，类似于“微型灾难”。我们意指增长普遍具有厚尾特征且非高斯分布。利用长期历史数据，我们实证表明自1870年以来发达经济体确实如此。聚焦和平时期，我们开发了一个易处理的局部投影框架，用于估计正常衰退和金融危机衰退的消费增长路径。引入随机系数局部投影法，我们能够从估计结果到校准模拟模型（包含可变严重程度的灾难）实现简单透明的映射。模拟显示，巨大的福利成本不仅来自罕见的大灾难，也来自每个周期中更小但更频繁的微型灾难。平均而言，在二战后数据中，即使风险厌恶程度较低，家庭也愿意牺牲约15%的消费来避免此类周期性波动。
26962.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E13, E21, E22, E32

26961.title: Expanding and Diversifying the Pool of Undergraduates who Study Economics: Insights from a New Introductory Course at Harvard
26961.zh_title: 扩大和多样化学习经济学的本科生群体：来自哈佛大学一门新入门课程的经验
26961.authors: Amanda Bayer, Gregory Bruich, Raj Chetty, Andrew Housiaux
26961.abstract: There is widespread concern that economics does not attract as broad or diverse a pool of talent as it could. For example, less than one-third of undergraduates who receive degrees in economics are women, significantly lower than in math or statistics. This article presents a case study of a new introductory undergraduate course at Harvard, “Using Big Data to Solve Economic and Social Problems,” that enrolled 400 students, achieved nearly a 50-50 gender balance, and was among the highest-rated courses in the college. We first summarize the course’s content and pedagogical approach. We then illustrate how this approach differs from that taken in traditional courses by showing how canonical topics – income inequality, tax incidence, and adverse selection – are taught differently. Then, drawing upon students’ comments and prior research on effective teaching practices, we identify elements of the course’s approach that appear to underlie its success: connecting the material to students’ own experiences; teaching skills that have social and career value; and engaging students in scientific investigation of real-world problems. We conclude by discussing how these ideas for improving instruction in economics could be applied in other courses and tested empirically in future research.
26961.zh_abstract: 人们普遍担忧经济学未能吸引尽可能广泛或多样化的人才库。例如，获得经济学学位的本科生中女性不到三分之一，显著低于数学或统计学。本文介绍了哈佛大学一门新的本科入门课程“利用大数据解决经济和社会问题”的案例研究，该课程招收了400名学生，实现了近50-50的性别平衡，并且是学院中评分最高的课程之一。我们首先总结了课程的内容和教学方法。然后，我们通过展示如何以不同方式教授经典主题——收入不平等、税收归宿和逆向选择——来说明这种方法与传统课程方法的差异。接着，借鉴学生的评论和先前关于有效教学实践的研究，我们确定了该课程方法中似乎构成其成功基础的要素：将材料与学生自身经历联系起来；教授具有社会和职业价值的技能；以及让学生参与对现实世界问题的科学探究。最后，我们讨论了如何将这些改进经济学教学的思路应用于其他课程，并在未来的研究中通过实证检验。

26960.title: International Trade and Social Connectedness
26960.zh_title: 国际贸易与社会关联性
26960.authors: Michael Bailey, Abhinav Gupta, Sebastian Hillenbrand, Theresa Kuchler, Robert J. Richmond, Johannes Stroebel
26960.abstract: We use anonymized data from Facebook to construct a new measure of the pairwise social connectedness between 180 countries and 332 European regions. We find that two countries trade more with each other when they are more socially connected and when they share social connections with a similar set of other countries. The social connections that determine trade in each product are those between the regions where the product is produced in the exporting country and those where it is used in the importing country. Once we control for social connectedness, the estimated effect of geographic distance on trade declines substantially, and the effect of country borders disappears. Our findings suggest that social connectedness increases trade by reducing information asymmetries and by providing a substitute for both trust and formal mechanisms of contract enforcement. We also present evidence against omitted variables and reverse causality as alternative explanations for the observed relationships between social connectedness and trade flows.
26960.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自Facebook的匿名数据，构建了一个衡量180个国家和332个欧洲地区之间成对社会关联性的新指标。我们发现，两个国家之间的社会关联性越强，并且它们与一组相似的其他国家共享社会联系时，它们之间的贸易量就越大。决定每种产品贸易的社会联系是出口国生产该产品的地区与进口国使用该产品的地区之间的联系。一旦我们控制了社会关联性，地理距离对贸易的估计影响显著下降，而国家边界的影响则消失。我们的发现表明，社会关联性通过减少信息不对称以及提供信任和正式合同执行机制的替代品来增加贸易。我们还提供了证据，反对遗漏变量和反向因果关系作为观察到的社会关联性与贸易流量之间关系的替代解释。
26960.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, PE, POL, PR；JEL：F1, F6, G0

26959.title: The Labor Market Returns to Advanced Degrees
26959.zh_title: 高级学位的劳动力市场回报
26959.abstract: We estimate the labor market return to an MBA, a JD, and master’s in engineering, nursing, education, psychology and social work, and thirteen other graduate degrees. To control for heterogeneity in preferences and ability, we use fixed effects for combinations of field-specific undergraduate and graduate degrees obtained by the last time we observe an individual. Basically, we compare earnings before the graduate degree to earnings after the degree. We find large differences across graduate fields in earnings effects, and more moderate differences in internal rates of return that account for program length and tuition. The returns often depend on the undergraduate major. The contribution of occupational upgrading to the earnings gain varies across degrees. Finally, simple regression-based estimates of returns to graduate fields are often highly misleading.
26959.zh_abstract: 我们估算了MBA、法学博士、工程学、护理学、教育学、心理学和社会工作硕士以及其他十三个研究生学位的劳动力市场回报。为控制偏好和能力异质性，我们使用了个体在最后一次观察时获得的特定领域本科和研究生学位组合的固定效应。基本上，我们比较了研究生学位前的收入与学位后的收入。我们发现不同研究生领域在收入效应上存在巨大差异，而在考虑项目时长和学费的内部收益率上差异较为温和。回报通常取决于本科专业。职业升级对收入增长的贡献因学位而异。最后，基于简单回归的研究生领域回报估计往往具有高度误导性。

26958.title: Why Are Corporate Payouts So High in the 2000s?
26958.zh_title: 为什么2000年代的企业派息如此之高？
26958.abstract: The average annual inflation-adjusted amount paid out through dividends and repurchases by public industrial firms is more than three times larger from 2000 to 2019 than from 1971 to 1999. We find that an increase in aggregate corporate income accounts for 37% of the increase in aggregate annual payouts and an increase in the payout rate accounts for 63%. Firms have higher payout rates in the 2000s not only because they are older, larger, and have more free cash flow, but also because they pay out more of their free cash flow. Though firms spend less on capital expenditures in the 2000s than before, capital expenditures decrease similarly for the firms with payouts and for firms without.
26958.zh_abstract: 从2000年到2019年，上市工业企业通过股息和回购支付的平均年通胀调整金额是1971年至1999年的三倍多。我们发现，企业总收入的增加占年度总派息增长的37%，而派息率的增加占63%。2000年代企业派息率更高，不仅因为它们更成熟、规模更大、自由现金流更多，还因为它们将更多的自由现金流用于派息。尽管2000年代企业在资本支出上的支出少于以往，但有派息的企业和无派息的企业在资本支出上的减少幅度相似。

26957.title: Is Fish Brain Food or Brain Poison? Sea Surface Temperature, Methyl-mercury and Child Cognitive Development
26957.zh_title: 鱼是健脑食品还是脑毒药？海面温度、甲基汞与儿童认知发展
26957.authors: Mark R. Rosenzweig, Rafael J. Santos Villagran
26957.abstract: We exploit variation in the composition of local fish catches around the time of birth using administrative and census data on adult cognitive test scores, schooling attainment, and occupation among coastal populations in Colombia to estimate the causal effects of early-life consumption of methylmercury (MeHg) and DHA, elements contained in fish, on cognitive development. Using an IV strategy based on an equilibrium model of fish supply that exploits time-series variation in oceanic SST anomalies on both coasts of Colombia from 1950 to 2014 as instruments, we find that net of cohort and municipality fixed effects increases in high-(low-)MeHg fish catches around a cohort’s birth negatively (positively) affect the cohort’s verbal and math test scores upon exiting high school and their likelihood of continuing their schooling, while increasing (decreasing) the likelihood the cohort is disproportionally represented in manual-labor occupations.
26957.zh_abstract: 我们利用哥伦比亚沿海人口在出生时当地渔获物组成的差异，结合成人认知测试分数、教育程度和职业的行政及普查数据，来估计生命早期摄入鱼类中所含甲基汞和DHA对认知发展的因果效应。我们采用基于鱼类供应均衡模型的工具变量策略，利用1950年至2014年哥伦比亚两岸海洋海面温度异常的时序变化作为工具变量。在控制队列和城市固定效应后，我们发现，队列出生时高（低）甲基汞鱼类渔获量的增加，对该队列高中毕业时的语言和数学测试分数以及继续接受教育的可能性产生负面（正面）影响，同时增加（减少）该队列在体力劳动职业中比例过高的可能性。

26956.title: The Value of Urgency: Evidence from Real-Time Congestion Pricing
26956.zh_title: 紧迫性的价值：来自实时拥堵定价的证据
26956.authors: Antonio Bento, Kevin Roth, Andrew R. Waxman
26956.abstract: Taking advantage of repeated appearances of drivers in Los Angeles’s ExpressLanes under varied traffic conditions, we uncover the distribution of individuals’ preferences for time savings in a novel application of a hedonic pricing model. In this setting, we introduce the concept of the value of urgency, defined by a component of willingness to pay to enter tolled lanes to avoid a congested alternative route. The value of urgency does not scale in the amount of time saved, reflecting discrete penalties for late arrival. We show that this value accounts for 87% of total willingness to pay to use the ExpressLanes, while the contributions to WTP from other widely used valuation measures, such as the values of time and reliability, are negligible. We suggest that quality-of-service pricing that varies in real time and removes uncertainty over travel times creates new markets for individuals to avoid lateness and reveal their preferences for urgency.
26956.zh_abstract: 利用洛杉矶快速车道司机在不同交通状况下反复出现的情况，我们在一项享乐定价模型的新应用中揭示了个体对时间节省偏好的分布。在此背景下，我们引入了紧迫性价值的概念，该价值由个体为避免拥堵替代路线而进入收费车道的支付意愿的一个组成部分来定义。紧迫性价值并不随节省的时间量而缩放，而是反映了对迟到的离散惩罚。我们表明，该价值占使用快速车道总支付意愿的87%，而其他广泛使用的估值指标（如时间价值和可靠性价值）对支付意愿的贡献可以忽略不计。我们建议，实时变化并消除出行时间不确定性的服务质量定价，为个体避免迟到并揭示其紧迫性偏好创造了新市场。
26956.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：D47, D61, D62, H23, L51, L91, Q58, R41

26955.title: Labor Market Polarization and The Great Urban Divergence
26955.zh_title: 劳动力市场极化与大城市分化
26955.authors: Donald R. Davis, Eric Mengus, Tomasz K. Michalski
26955.abstract: Labor market polarization is among the most important features in recent decades of advanced country labor markets. Yet key spatial aspects of this phenomenon remain under-explored. We develop four key facts that document the universality of polarization, a city-size difference in the shock magnitudes, a skew in the types of middle-paid jobs lost, and the role of polarization in the great urban divergence. Existing theories cannot account for these facts. Hence we develop a parsimonious theoretical account that does so by integrating elements from the literatures on labor market polarization and systems of cities with heterogeneous labor in spatial equilibrium.
26955.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场极化是近几十年来发达国家劳动力市场最重要的特征之一。然而，这一现象的关键空间方面仍未得到充分探索。我们提出了四个关键事实，记录了极化的普遍性、冲击幅度在城市规模上的差异、所流失的中等收入工作类型的偏向性，以及极化在大城市分化中的作用。现有理论无法解释这些事实。因此，我们通过整合劳动力市场极化和城市体系（在空间均衡中具有异质性劳动力）这两个领域的文献要素，发展了一个简洁的理论解释。

26954.title: U.S. Economic Activity During the Early Weeks of the SARS-Cov-2 Outbreak
26954.zh_title: SARS-CoV-2疫情爆发最初几周的美国经济活动
26954.authors: Daniel Lewis, Karel Mertens, James H. Stock
26954.abstract: This paper describes a weekly economic index (WEI) developed to track the rapid economic developments associated with the response to the novel Coronavirus in the United States. The WEI shows a strong and sudden decline in economic activity starting in the week ending March 21, 2020. In the most recent week ending March 28, the WEI indicates economic activity has fallen further to -6.19% scaled to 4 quarter growth in GDP.
26954.zh_abstract: 本文描述了一个为追踪美国应对新型冠状病毒相关的快速经济动态而开发的每周经济指数（WEI）。WEI显示，经济活动从截至2020年3月21日的那一周开始出现强劲而突然的下降。在最近截至3月28日的一周，WEI表明经济活动进一步下降至-6.19%（按GDP的四个季度增长率进行缩放）。

26953.title: Isolating the “Tech” from EdTech: Experimental Evidence on Computer Assisted Learning in China
26953.zh_title: 将“技术”从教育技术中分离出来：中国计算机辅助学习的实验证据
26953.authors: Yue Ma, Robert W. Fairlie, Prashant Loyalka, Scott Rozelle
26953.abstract: EdTech which includes online education, computer assisted learning (CAL), and remote instruction was expanding rapidly even before the current full-scale substitution for in-person learning at all levels of education around the world because of the coronavirus pandemic. Studies of CAL interventions have consistently found large positive effects, bolstering arguments for the widespread use of EdTech. However CAL programs, often held after school, provide not only computer-based instruction, but often additional non-technology based inputs such as more time on learning and instructional support by facilitators. In this paper, we develop a theoretical model to carefully explore the possible channels by which CAL programs might affect academic outcomes among schoolchildren. We isolate and test the technology-based effects of CAL and additional parameters from the theoretical model, by designing a novel multi-treatment field experiment with more than four thousand schoolchildren in rural China. Although we find evidence of positive overall CAL program effects on academic outcomes, when we isolate the technology-based effect of CAL (over and above traditional pencil-and-paper learning) we generally find small to null effects. Our empirical results suggest that, at times, the “Tech” in EdTech may have relatively small effects on academic outcomes, which has important implications for the continued, rapid expansion of technologies such as CAL throughout the world.
26953.zh_abstract: 教育技术（包括在线教育、计算机辅助学习（CAL）和远程教学）在因新冠疫情导致全球各级教育全面替代面对面学习之前就已经在迅速扩张。对CAL干预措施的研究一致发现了较大的积极效应，这支持了广泛使用教育技术的论点。然而，CAL项目通常在课后进行，不仅提供基于计算机的教学，还经常提供额外的非技术性投入，例如更多的学习时间和辅导员的指导支持。在本文中，我们开发了一个理论模型，以仔细探索CAL项目可能影响学龄儿童学业成绩的渠道。我们通过设计一项针对中国农村四千多名学龄儿童的新型多处理现场实验，分离并测试了CAL的技术效应以及理论模型中的其他参数。尽管我们发现了CAL项目对学业成绩有积极总体效应的证据，但当我们分离出CAL的技术效应（相对于传统的纸笔学习）时，我们通常发现效应很小甚至为零。我们的实证结果表明，有时教育技术中的“技术”对学业成绩的影响可能相对较小，这对CAL等技术在全球范围内的持续快速扩张具有重要意义。
26953.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, I25

26952.title: Demographic Determinants of Testing Incidence and COVID-19 Infections in New York City Neighborhoods
26952.zh_title: 纽约市社区检测发生率和COVID-19感染的人口决定因素
26952.abstract: New York City is the hot spot of the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States. This paper merges information on the number of tests and the number of infections at the New York City zip code level with demographic and socioeconomic information from the decennial census and the American Community Surveys. People residing in poor or immigrant neighborhoods were less likely to be tested; but the likelihood that a test was positive was larger in those neighborhoods, as well as in neighborhoods with larger households or predominantly black populations. The rate of infection in the population depends on both the frequency of tests and on the fraction of positive tests among those tested. The non-randomness in testing across New York City neighborhoods indicates that the observed correlation between the rate of infection and the socioeconomic characteristics of a community tells an incomplete story of how the pandemic evolved in a congested urban setting.
26952.zh_abstract: 纽约市是美国COVID-19大流行的热点地区。本文将纽约市邮政编码层面的检测次数和感染人数信息与十年一次的人口普查和美国社区调查中的人口和社会经济信息相结合。居住在贫困或移民社区的人接受检测的可能性较低；但在这些社区，以及家庭规模较大或黑人人口占多数的社区，检测呈阳性的可能性更大。人口中的感染率既取决于检测频率，也取决于受检者中阳性检测的比例。纽约市各社区检测的非随机性表明，观察到的感染率与社区社会经济特征之间的相关性，只讲述了疫情在拥挤的城市环境中如何演变的不完整故事。

26951.title: Leaving No Ethical Value Behind: Triage Protocol Design for Pandemic Rationing
26951.zh_title: 不抛弃任何伦理价值：大流行配给的分类协议设计
26951.authors: Parag A. Pathak, Tayfun Sönmez, M. Utku Unver, M. Bumin Yenmez
26951.abstract: Rationing of medical resources is a critical issue in the COVID-19 pandemic. Most existing triage protocols are based on a priority point system, in which a formula specifies the order in which the supply of a resource, such as a ventilator, is to be rationed for patients. A priority point system generates an identical priority ranking specifying claims on all units. Triage protocols in some states (e.g. Michigan) prioritize frontline health workers giving heavier weight to the ethical principle of instrumental value. Others (e.g. New York) do not, reasoning that if frontline workers obtain high enough priority, there is a risk that they obtain all units and none remain for the general community. This debate is pressing given substantial COVID-19 health risks for frontline workers. In this paper, we analyze the consequences of rationing medical resources through a reserve system. In a reserve system, resources are placed into multiple categories. Priorities guiding allocation of units can reflect different ethical values between these categories. A reserve system provides additional flexibility over a priority point system because it does not dictate a single priority order for the allocation of all units. It offers a middle-ground approach that balances competing objectives, such as in the medical worker debate. This flexibility requires attention to implementation, especially the processing order of reserve categories. We describe our model of a reserve system, characterize its potential outcomes, and examine distributional implications of particular reserve systems. We also discuss several practical considerations with triage protocol design.
26951.zh_abstract: 医疗资源的配给是COVID-19大流行中的一个关键问题。大多数现有的分类协议基于优先级积分系统，其中公式规定了呼吸机等资源供应分配给患者的顺序。优先级积分系统会产生一个相同的优先级排序，指定对所有单位的索取权。一些州（例如密歇根州）的分类协议优先考虑一线卫生工作者，给予工具性价值这一伦理原则更大的权重。其他州（例如纽约州）则不这样做，理由是如果一线工作者获得足够高的优先级，他们可能会获得所有单位，而普通社区则一无所有。鉴于一线工作者面临巨大的COVID-19健康风险，这场辩论十分紧迫。在本文中，我们分析了通过储备系统配给医疗资源的后果。在储备系统中，资源被分为多个类别。指导单位分配的优先级可以在这些类别之间反映不同的伦理价值。储备系统比优先级积分系统提供了额外的灵活性，因为它不规定所有单位分配的单一优先级顺序。它提供了一种平衡竞争目标（例如在医务工作者辩论中）的中间立场方法。这种灵活性需要注意实施，特别是储备类别的处理顺序。我们描述了我们的储备系统模型，刻画了其潜在结果，并考察了特定储备系统的分配影响。我们还讨论了分类协议设计中的几个实际考虑因素。

26999.title: Measuring Racial Discrimination in Bail Decisions
26999.zh_title: 衡量保释决定中的种族歧视
26999.authors: David Arnold, Will S. Dobbie, Peter Hull
26999.abstract: We develop new quasi-experimental tools to measure disparate impact, regardless of its source, in the context of bail decisions. We show that omitted variables bias in pretrial release rate comparisons can be purged by using the quasi-random assignment of judges to estimate average pretrial misconduct risk by race. We find that two-thirds of the release rate disparity between white and Black defendants in New York City is due to the disparate impact of release decisions. We then develop a hierarchical marginal treatment effect model to study the drivers of disparate impact, finding evidence of both racial bias and statistical discrimination.
26999.zh_abstract: 我们开发了新的准实验工具来衡量保释决定背景下的差异性影响，无论其来源如何。我们表明，通过利用法官的准随机分配来估计按种族划分的平均审前不当行为风险，可以消除审前释放率比较中的遗漏变量偏差。我们发现，纽约市白人和黑人被告之间释放率差异的三分之二归因于释放决定的差异性影响。然后，我们开发了一个分层边际处理效应模型来研究差异性影响的驱动因素，发现了种族偏见和统计歧视的证据。

26998.title: Ageing-Driven Migration and Redistribution: Comparing Policy Regimes
26998.zh_title: 老龄化驱动的移民与再分配：比较政策体制
26998.abstract: Life cycle and insurance-type considerations dominate redistribution policy. Wage and fiscal prospects of ageing dominate migration policy. The paper compares distinct policy regimes, directed at migration and redistribution issues. Migration quotas, provision of social benefits, labor income taxation, and capital income taxation, are all endogenously determined in a policy-optimizing framework. The analysis makes a three-way comparison: free-migration regime vs. restricted-migration regime, welfare-state regime vs. no-migration-quota, no-redistribution regime, and low-income-majority regime vs. high-income-majority regime.
26998.zh_abstract: 生命周期和保险类型的考虑主导着再分配政策。工资和财政前景的老龄化主导着移民政策。本文比较了针对移民和再分配问题的不同政策体制。移民配额、社会福利提供、劳动收入税和资本收入税，都在一个政策优化框架内内生决定。分析进行了三向比较：自由移民体制 vs. 限制移民体制，福利国家体制 vs. 无移民配额、无再分配体制，以及低收入多数体制 vs. 高收入多数体制。

26997.title: Sticky Capital Controls
26997.authors: Miguel Acosta-Henao, Laura Alfaro, Andrés Fernández
26997.abstract: We build a new dataset using textual analysis, from which we document a set of stylized facts regarding the use of capital controls, along their intensive and extensive margins for 21 emerging markets, with a focus on priced-based controls. We document that capital controls are “sticky”; that is, changes do not occur frequently, and when they do, they remain in place for a long time. Overall, price-based capital controls have not been used systematically across countries or time, and there has been considerable heterogeneity across countries in terms of the intensity with which they have been used. We then present a model of capital controls relying on pecuniary externalities augmented by including an (S; s) cost of implementing such policies and illustrate how this friction goes a long way toward bringing the model closer to the data. When the extended model is calibrated for each of the countries in the new dataset, we find that the size of these costs is large, thus substantially reducing the welfare-enhancing effects of capital controls compared with the frictionless Ramsey benchmark. We conclude with a discussion of the structural interpretations of such costs, which calls for a richer set of policy constraints when considering the use of capital controls in models of pecuniary externalities.
26997.zh_abstract: 我们利用文本分析构建了一个新的数据集，从中记录了21个新兴市场在资本管制使用方面的一系列典型事实，包括其集约边际和广延边际，重点关注基于价格的管制。我们记录到资本管制是“粘性的”；也就是说，变化不频繁发生，而且一旦发生，会持续很长时间。总体而言，基于价格的资本管制并未在各国或各时期被系统性地使用，各国在使用强度上存在相当大的异质性。然后，我们提出了一个依赖于货币外部性的资本管制模型，并通过加入实施此类政策的（S；s）成本来扩展该模型，并说明这种摩擦如何大大有助于使模型更接近数据。当扩展模型针对新数据集中的每个国家进行校准后，我们发现这些成本的规模很大，从而与无摩擦的拉姆齐基准相比，大大降低了资本管制的福利提升效应。最后，我们讨论了这些成本的结构性解释，这要求在考虑货币外部性模型中使用资本管制时，考虑更丰富的政策约束集。

26996.title: Distributing Personal Income: Trends Over Time
26996.zh_title: 个人收入分配：随时间变化的趋势
26996.authors: Dennis Fixler, Marina Gindelsky, David Johnson
26996.abstract: This paper constructs a distribution of Personal Income for the United States (2007-2016) to investigate the relationship between inequality and macroeconomic growth. We extend a perspective first presented in Fixler and Johnson (2014) and further developed in Fixler et al. (2017) and Fixler, Gindelsky, and Johnson (2018, 2019) to develop a national account-based measure using a decade of publicly available survey, tax, and administrative data. By using (equivalized) households as the base unit of analysis and focusing on a more inclusive definition of income than most inequality studies (i.e., including health, transfers, and financial assets), we improve on existing economic measures of inequality in a meaningful way and bridge the gap between micro data and macro statistics. We produce a wide set of inequality results over the period, drawing a comparison with other studies (including Auten and Splinter (2019) and Piketty, Saez, and Zucman (2018)).
26996.zh_abstract: 本文构建了美国个人收入分配（2007-2016年），以研究不平等与宏观经济增长之间的关系。我们扩展了Fixler和Johnson（2014）首次提出、并在Fixler等人（2017）以及Fixler、Gindelsky和Johnson（2018, 2019）中进一步发展的视角，利用十年间公开可得的调查、税收和行政数据，开发了一种基于国民账户的衡量指标。通过使用（等值化后的）家庭作为基本分析单位，并关注比大多数不平等研究更具包容性的收入定义（即包括健康、转移支付和金融资产），我们以有意义的方式改进了现有的经济不平等衡量指标，并弥合了微观数据与宏观统计之间的差距。我们生成了该时期一系列广泛的不平等结果，并与其他研究（包括Auten和Splinter（2019）以及Piketty、Saez和Zucman（2018））进行了比较。

26995.title: The Macroeconomic Stabilization of Tariff Shocks: What is the Optimal Monetary Response?
26995.zh_title: 关税冲击的宏观经济稳定：最优货币政策应对是什么？
26995.abstract: In the wake of Brexit and Trump trade war, central banks face the need to reconsider the role of monetary policy in managing the inflationary-recessionary effects of hikes in tariffs. Using a New Keynesian model enriched with global value chains and firm dynamics, we show that the optimal monetary response is expansionary. It supports activity and producer prices at the expense of aggravating short-run headline inflation---contrary to the prescription of the standard Taylor rule. This holds all the more when the home currency is dominant in pricing of international trade.
26995.zh_abstract: 在英国脱欧和特朗普贸易战之后，中央银行面临重新考虑货币政策在管理关税上调带来的通胀-衰退效应中作用的必要性。利用一个融入了全球价值链和企业动态的新凯恩斯主义模型，我们表明最优货币政策应对是扩张性的。它支持经济活动和生产商价格，但代价是加剧短期总体通胀——这与标准泰勒规则的处方相反。当本币在国际贸易定价中占主导地位时，这一点尤其成立。

26994.title: Do People Have a Bias for Low-Deductible Insurance?
26994.zh_title: 人们是否偏好低免赔额保险？
26994.abstract: Do consumers show a strong bias toward low deductible insurance plans, as many field studies imply? This paper reports on a controlled experiment intended to see whether subjects have a predisposition toward such plans and whether that preference is consistent when their default plan and premiums are changed. Subjects were presented with a scenario where they had to make a decision on whether to purchase a plan with a low deductible (LD) or high deductible (HD) when faced with an illness having a specified probability and cost. Participants had to choose between these plans in two rounds with the identical risk of an illness and specified premiums. If their default option was an LD plan in Round 1, then it was an HD plan in Round 2. The experiment did not show a strong bias toward low deductible health plans. Only slightly more than half of the respondents chose an LD plan even when it was optimal for them to do so. When faced with a default option that was switched in Round 2, 58% of the respondents chose the same plan as they did in Round 1, implying that some but not all subjects resisted the default option in their decision process. Subject choices were correlated with their responses to questions about risk aversion and a desire for peace of mind.
26994.zh_abstract: 消费者是否像许多实地研究所暗示的那样，表现出对低免赔额保险计划的强烈偏好？本文报告了一项受控实验，旨在考察受试者是否对此类计划有先入为主的偏好，以及当他们的默认计划和保费发生变化时，这种偏好是否一致。受试者被置于一个场景中，他们必须决定在面临具有特定概率和成本的疾病时，是购买低免赔额（LD）计划还是高免赔额（HD）计划。参与者在两轮中需要在相同的疾病风险和指定保费下在这些计划之间做出选择。如果他们在第一轮的默认选项是LD计划，那么第二轮中默认选项就是HD计划。实验并未显示出对低免赔额健康计划的强烈偏好。即使选择LD计划对他们来说是最优的，也只有略多于一半的受访者选择了LD计划。当面临第二轮中默认选项被切换的情况时，58%的受访者选择了与第一轮相同的计划，这意味着部分（而非全部）受试者在决策过程中抵制了默认选项。受试者的选择与他们关于风险规避和追求安心的问题的回答相关。
26994.meta: Programs：EH；JEL：C90, C91, D03, D12, D3, D81, G22, I11, I18

26993.title: In Praise of Moderation: Suggestions for the Scope and Use of Pre-Analysis Plans for RCTs in Economics
26993.zh_title: 适度之赞：经济学随机对照试验预分析计划的范围与使用建议
26993.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Esther Duflo, Amy Finkelstein, Lawrence F. Katz, Benjamin A. Olken, Anja Sautmann
26993.abstract: Pre-Analysis Plans (PAPs) for randomized evaluations are becoming increasingly common in Economics, but their definition remains unclear and their practical applications therefore vary widely. Based on our collective experiences as researchers and editors, we articulate a set of principles for the ex-ante scope and ex-post use of PAPs. We argue that the key benefits of a PAP can usually be realized by completing the registration fields in the AEA RCT Registry. Specific cases where more detail may be warranted include when subgroup analysis is expected to be particularly important, or a party to the study has a vested interest. However, a strong norm for more detailed pre-specification can be detrimental to knowledge creation when implementing field experiments in the real world. An ex-post requirement of strict adherence to pre-specified plans, or the discounting of non-pre-specified work, may mean that some experiments do not take place, or that interesting observations and new theories are not explored and reported. Rather, we recommend that the final research paper be written and judged as a distinct object from the “results of the PAP”; to emphasize this distinction, researchers could consider producing a short, publicly available report (the “populated PAP”) that populates the PAP to the extent possible and briefly discusses any barriers to doing so.
26993.zh_abstract: 随机评估的预分析计划（PAP）在经济学中正变得越来越普遍，但其定义仍不明确，因此实际应用差异很大。基于我们作为研究人员和编辑的集体经验，我们阐述了一套关于PAP事前范围和事后使用的原则。我们认为，PAP的主要好处通常可以通过完成AEA RCT注册表中的注册字段来实现。可能需要更详细说明的具体情况包括：当亚组分析预计特别重要时，或者研究的某一方有既得利益时。然而，在现实世界中实施实地实验时，对更详细预先规范的强烈规范可能不利于知识创造。事后要求严格遵守预先指定的计划，或贬低非预先指定的工作，可能意味着一些实验无法进行，或者有趣的观察和新理论得不到探索和报告。相反，我们建议将最终的研究论文作为与“PAP结果”不同的对象来撰写和评判；为了强调这种区别，研究人员可以考虑制作一份简短的、公开可用的报告（“填充后的PAP”），该报告尽可能填充PAP，并简要讨论任何阻碍这样做的因素。

26992.title: Did California’s Shelter-in-Place Order Work? Early Coronavirus-Related Public Health Effects
26992.zh_title: 加利福尼亚州的居家令有效吗？早期的冠状病毒相关公共卫生效应
26992.authors: Andrew I. Friedson, Drew McNichols, Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval Dave
26992.abstract: On March 19, 2020, California Governor Gavin Newsom issued Executive Order N-33-20 2020, which required all residents of the state of California to shelter in place for all but essential activities such as grocery shopping, retrieving prescriptions from a pharmacy, or caring for relatives. This shelter-in-place order (SIPO), the first such statewide order issued in the United States, was designed to reduce COVID-19 cases and mortality. While the White House Task Force on the Coronavirus has credited the State of California for taking early action to prevent a statewide COVID-19 outbreak, no study has examined its impact. This study is the first to estimate the effect of SIPO adoption on health. Using daily state-level coronavirus data and a synthetic control research design, we find that California’s statewide SIPO reduced COVID-19 cases by 125.5 to 219.7 per 100,000 population by April 20, one month following the order. We further find that California’s SIPO led to as many as 1,661 fewer COVID-19 deaths during this period. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that there were about 400 job losses per life saved during this short-run post-treatment period.
26992.zh_abstract: 2020年3月19日，加利福尼亚州州长加文·纽瑟姆发布了N-33-20 2020号行政命令，要求该州所有居民除购买食品杂货、从药房取药或照顾亲属等必要活动外，均需居家。这项居家令（SIPO）是美国首个此类全州范围的命令，旨在减少COVID-19病例和死亡率。尽管白宫冠状病毒工作组称赞加利福尼亚州采取了早期行动以防止全州范围内的COVID-19疫情爆发，但尚无研究检验其影响。本研究首次估计了SIPO采纳对健康的影响。利用每日州级冠状病毒数据和合成控制研究设计，我们发现，加利福尼亚州的州级SIPO在命令发布一个月后的4月20日，使每10万人口的COVID-19病例减少了125.5至219.7例。我们进一步发现，在此期间，加利福尼亚州的SIPO导致COVID-19死亡人数减少了多达1661人。粗略计算表明，在这一短期后处理期间，每挽救一条生命大约损失了400个工作岗位。
26992.meta: Programs：AG, CH, DEV, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I18

26991.title: Three Prongs for Prudent Climate Policy
26991.zh_title: 审慎气候政策的三个方向
26991.authors: Joseph E. Aldy, Richard J. Zeckhauser
26991.abstract: For three decades, advocates for climate change policy have simultaneously emphasized the urgency of taking ambitious actions to mitigate greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and provided false reassurances of the feasibility of doing so. The policy prescription has relied almost exclusively on a single approach: reduce emissions of carbon dioxide (CO2) and other GHGs. Since 1990, global CO2 emissions have increased 60 percent, atmospheric CO2 concentrations have raced past 400 parts per million, and temperatures increased at an accelerating rate. The one-prong strategy has not worked. After reviewing emission mitigation’s poor performance and low-probability of delivering on long-term climate goals, we evaluate a three-pronged strategy for mitigating climate change risks: adding adaptation and amelioration – through solar radiation management (SRM) – to the emission mitigation approach. We identify SRM’s potential, at dramatically lower cost than emission mitigation, to play a key role in offsetting warming. We address the moral hazard reservation held by environmental advocates – that SRM would diminish emission mitigation incentives – and posit that SRM deployment might even serve as an “awful action alert” that galvanizes more ambitious emission mitigation. We conclude by assessing the value of an iterative act-learn-act policy framework that engages all three prongs for limiting climate change damages.
26991.zh_abstract: 三十年来，气候变化政策的倡导者同时强调了采取雄心勃勃的行动以减少温室气体（GHG）排放的紧迫性，并对其可行性提供了虚假的保证。政策处方几乎完全依赖于单一方法：减少二氧化碳（CO2）和其他GHG的排放。自1990年以来，全球CO2排放量增加了60%，大气CO2浓度已超过百万分之400，气温以加速的速度上升。单一方向战略未能奏效。在回顾了减排的糟糕表现及其实现长期气候目标的低概率之后，我们评估了一种减轻气候变化风险的三方向战略：在减排方法的基础上增加适应和改善——通过太阳辐射管理（SRM）。我们指出了SRM在抵消变暖方面的潜力，其成本远低于减排。我们解决了环保倡导者持有的道德风险保留意见——即SRM会削弱减排激励——并假设SRM部署甚至可能作为一种“可怕行动警报”，激发更雄心勃勃的减排。最后，我们评估了一个迭代的“行动-学习-行动”政策框架的价值，该框架利用所有三个方向来限制气候变化损害。

26970.title: Generalized Robustness and Dynamic Pessimism
26970.zh_title: 广义稳健性与动态悲观主义
26970.authors: Pascal J. Maenhout, Andrea Vedolin, Hao Xing
26970.abstract: This paper develops a theory of dynamic pessimism and its impact on asset prices. Notions of time-varying pessimism arise endogenously in our setting as a consequence of agents’ concern for model misspecification. We generalize the robust control approach of Hansen and Sargent (2001) by replacing relative entropy as a measure of discrepancy between models by the more general family of Cressie-Read discrepancies. As a consequence, the decision-maker’s distorted beliefs appear as an endogenous state variable driving risk aversion, portfolio decisions, and equilibrium asset prices. Using survey data, we estimate time-varying pessimism and find that such a proxy features a strong business cycle component. We then show that using our measure of pessimism helps match salient features in equity markets such as excess volatility and high equity premium.
26970.zh_abstract: 本文发展了一种动态悲观主义理论及其对资产价格的影响。在我们的设定中，时变悲观主义的概念内生地产生，作为代理人担心模型误设的结果。我们推广了Hansen和Sargent（2001）的稳健控制方法，用更一般的Cressie-Read差异族替代相对熵作为模型间差异的度量。因此，决策者的扭曲信念作为一个内生状态变量出现，驱动风险厌恶、投资组合决策和均衡资产价格。利用调查数据，我们估计了时变悲观主义，并发现这种代理变量具有显著的商业周期成分。然后，我们表明，使用我们的悲观主义度量有助于匹配股票市场中的显著特征，如过度波动和高股权溢价。
